name: BCAA Glutamine
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine is the all-natural solution for active individuals and athletes looking to accelerate muscle recovery, reduce delayed-onset muscle soreness (DOMS), and support hydration. Each serving of this deliciously refreshing formula provides 8,000 mg of fermented, vegan-friendly branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) in the evidence-based 2:1:1 ratio, plus 5,000 mg of L-glutamine, 1,500 mg of vitamin C, and 1,000 mg of coconut water powder.

Unlike many BCAA supplements, our BCAA powder doesn't contain animal-derived amino acids, added sugars, artificial sweeteners (e.g., acesulfame potassium and sucralose), artificial food dyes, or unnecessary additives.

Key Features

  • Clinically Dosed BCAA Powder: Each serving of Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine includes 8,000 mg of vegan branched-chain amino acids in a 2:1:1 ratio to enhance muscle recovery, reduce muscle soreness, and bolster muscle protein synthesis.

  • Synergistic Formula for Pre-/Intra-/Post-Workout Use: In addition to branched-chain amino acids, our BCAA powder provides 5,000 mg of L-glutamine, 1,500 mg of vitamin C, and 1,000 mg of coconut water powder to promote hydration, support immune function, and decrease muscle damage.

  • Vegan-Friendly, Gluten-Free, and Non-GMO: Many BCAA supplements contain low-grade amino acids derived from human hair; we formulated an original BCAA powder with fermented, vegan-friendly BCAAs made from microbial cultures. This product is also non-GMO and gluten-free to accommodate your healthy lifestyle.

  • Pure, Quality Ingredients (No Fillers or Nonsense): Consistent with our core values, Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine is third-party tested for purity, potency, and authenticity. Our BCAA powder is naturally flavored and sweetened with stevia to accommodate your healthy lifestyle; no artificial additives or sugar.

  • Delicious and Natural Fruit Flavors: Choose from four tasty flavors - Strawberry Lemonade, Blue Raspberry, Sour Green Apple, and Tropical Punch.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

How to Use

Instructions

Combine one (1) level scoop of Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine with 10-12 ounces of cold water or your preferred beverage and mix until powder is fully dissolved. Consume 30-45 minutes before, during, or immediately after your workout.

An additional one to two scoops may be taken throughout the day. Do not exceed three (3) servings per day.

Optimal Consumption Times

  • Pre-Workout: Consuming our BCAA powder before your workout helps prime your body for exercise with key amino acids and micronutrients.

  • Intra-Workout: Sipping on a serving of Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine during your workout can prevent a decline in performance by mitigating muscle fatigue and sustaining hydration. This is especially beneficial if you tend to sweat a lot or exercise in hot/humid conditions.

  • Post-Workout: Ingesting Transparent Labs BCAA Glutamine post-workout aids in recovery by supporting protein synthesis, reducing soreness, and rehydrating the body.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Fermented Branched-Chain Amino Acids (BCAAs) 2:1:1 | 8,000 mg

Branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) are a group of three essential amino acids—L-leucine, L-isoleucine, and L-valine—that play an integral role in muscle protein synthesis, the process by which cells create new muscle proteins (which is necessary for muscle recovery and hypertrophy). While there are nine essential amino acids, L-leucine is widely regarded as the “master regulator” of protein synthesis [1].

Research suggests that supplementing with a 2:1:1 ratio of BCAAs (leucine: isoleucine:valine) post-workout can mitigate the severity of delayed-onset muscle soreness (DOMS) and decrease muscle damage markers, such as creatine kinase [2]. Further evidence indicates that BCAA supplementation improves endurance and muscle strength by reducing rates of perceived exertion and increasing lactate thresholds during exercise [3, 4].

Additionally, BCAAs can help protect against muscle protein breakdown during weight-loss phases [5, 6].

Glutamine | 5,000 mg

L-glutamine is the most abundant free amino acid in human muscle and plasma; however, it is a conditionally essential amino acid for active gym-goers and athletes since intense and long-duration exercise can deplete glutamine stores in the body [7].

Studies show that glutamine supplementation helps improve muscle glycogen synthesis, gut health, and immune function in active individuals, making it useful for muscle recovery and performance [8, 9, 10]. Clinical research has shown that glutamine also plays a key role in protein synthesis despite being a non-essential amino acid [11].

Vitamin C | 1,500 mg

Vitamin C is a ubiquitous antioxidant vitamin that, when taken in large doses (>1 gram per day), can reduce muscle soreness and bolster recovery between workouts [12]. It also plays a vital role in collagen synthesis and throughout the immune system, with evidence that it may reduce the severity and duration of upper respiratory tract infections [13].

Coconut Water Powder | 1,000 mg

Coconut water is one of the best natural sources of electrolytes and trace minerals, making it a perfect ingredient for replenishing and rehydrating during and after training. Coconut (Cocos nucifera) has been shown to provide a wealth of general health benefits, including, but not limited to [14]: 

  • Rehydrating the body

  • Fighting inflammation

  • Balancing blood glucose and insulin levels

  • Promoting immune function

  • Enhancing eye and skin health

  • Supporting kidney function

FAQs Section

What Does BCAA Powder Do?

BCAA powder supplies three essential amino acids known as branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs) in their free form (hence, they are rapidly absorbed). The body cannot produce essential amino acids (including BCAAs) on its own, so we must obtain them regularly via whole foods and/or nutritional supplements.

Is it OK to Take BCAAs Every Day?

Yes, taking up to 20 grams of BCAAs daily in divided doses (~5-10 g per dose) is considered safe. However, BCAAs are not intended as a sole source of nutrition and will not offset a lack of protein in the diet.

Can I Take BCAA Powder with a Protein Shake?

Yes, you can use BCAA powder as a means of enriching any powdered protein source.

How do BCAAs Compare to Creatine?

While BCAAs aid muscle repair and growth, creatine is primarily used to boost power and strength during high-intensity training. Both supplements can be useful for athletes and gym-goers.

When is the Best Time of Day to Take BCAAs?

Ideally, BCAA powder should be consumed before, during, or immediately after workouts to maximize muscle repair and mitigate exercise-induced muscle soreness. BCAAs are rapidly absorbed and easy on the stomach, so drinking a BCAA solution during workouts won't weigh you down like a protein shake.

When Will My Order Be Shipped Out?

All orders are dispatched the following business day.

Does Transparent Labs Ship to My Country?

Yes, Transparent Labs ships worldwide (with exceptions due to fraudulent activity in specific countries).

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

Yes, this product contains tree nuts (coconut).

name: Beast Bulk Pre-Workout
description_html:
Overview

Pre-workout supplements—all with virtually identical formulas—are a dime a dozen these days. As one of the industry’s top-selling pre-workout powders, Transparent Labs Bulk Pre-Workout has separated itself from the competition thanks to a comprehensive, evidence-based lineup of clinically dosed ingredients, fully transparent labeling, and absolutely no artificial color/food dyes, artificial sweeteners, or artificial flavoring.

With over 17 grams of active ingredients per scoop, BULK Pre-Workout sets the stage for you to crush it in the gym and pack on lean muscle mass by enhancing muscle strength, blood flow (muscle pumps), endurance, focus, and energy.

Key Features

  • Science-Based Pre-Workout Supplement for Increasing Lean Muscle Mass: BULK Pre-Workout is formulated for gym-goers and athletes who prioritize muscle-building and improved physical performance.

  • Enhances Strength, Stamina, and Muscle Pumps During Training: With an unmatched blend of clinically dosed nitric oxide boosters and ergogenic aids, BULK Pre-Workout fortifies athletic performance and bolsters blood flow starting from the very first scoop.

  • Supports Anabolic Hormone Production: The natural testosterone-supporting ingredients in BULK Pre-Workout provide lasting nutritional support for muscle growth and recovery.

  • Promotes Mental acuity, Focus, Drive, and Energy: Get dialed in for every workout with hard-hitting nootropics like AlphaSize® alpha-GPC, PurCaf® caffeine, L-tyrosine, and taurine. 

  • Naturally Flavored and Sweetened with Stevia: Most pre-workouts come loaded with artificial colors, sweeteners, or flavors. We know you care about what you put in your body, so BULK Pre-Workout is made with natural flavoring and stevia instead of the hidden junk you find in other pre-workout formulas.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

*Doses listed are per serving (1 full scoop)

L-Citrulline Malate (2:1) | 8,000 mg

L-citrulline is an amino acid naturally found in watermelon that plays an important role in kidney function. It's become a popular ingredient in pre-workout supplements due to its ability to boost nitric oxide levels [1]. When nitric oxide production increases, blood flow improves, allowing nutrients and oxygen to replenish muscle tissue more efficiently. Ultimately, this translates to greater muscle pumps and heightened energy levels.

Numerous studies have demonstrated the ergogenic effects of L-citrulline malate, the citrulline salt of malic acid, such as:

  • Improving strength, aerobic performance, and muscle endurance [2, 3]

  • Elevating nitric oxide levels even more than equivalent doses of L-arginine [4]

  • Enhancing muscle anabolism and reducing muscle catabolism [5]

Beta-Alanine | 4,000 mg

Beta-alanine is a beta-amino acid that combines with L-histidine to form a dipeptide known as carnosine. Supplementing with beta-alanine has been shown to increase muscle carnosine levels, which are quickly depleted during intense exercise [6].

Carnosine is an endogenous dipeptide that functions as a buffer in muscle cells, thereby attenuating the accumulation of acidic byproducts of muscular exertion (e.g. lactate and hydrogen ions) [7]. Hence, bolstering muscle carnosine levels—via beta-alanine—allows you to push yourself longer and harder in the gym.

Pre-workout supplements almost always contain beta-alanine but in inefficacious doses. We made sure to include a full clinical dose of beta-alanine (4,000 mg) in every scoop of BULK Pre-Workout. Relevant evidence-based benefits of beta-alanine include:

  • Delaying the onset of neuromuscular fatigue during intense exercise [8]

  • Increasing overall muscle strength [9] 

  • Improving muscle endurance and total work capacity [10]

  • Reducing and combatting the formation of dysfunctional proteins and promoting the formation of healthy proteins [11]

  • Significantly increasing lean muscle mass as part of a diligent resistance-training program [12]

*Note that beta-alanine causes a benign tingling sensation known as paresthesia while the body acclimates to higher carnosine levels. This effect is harmless and gradually lessens with consistent use.

BetaPure™ Betaine Anhydrous | 2,500 mg

Betaine, also known as trimethylglycine, is a naturally occurring metabolite that serves as a methyl donor and osmolyte in the body. Though the mechanisms are not entirely understood, betaine supplementation has shown promise in enhancing power output and, to a lesser extent, endurance capacity in athletes [13, 14, 15]. It is plausible that betaine supplementation promotes athletic performance by maintaining cellular hydration and reducing homocysteine levels, thereby encouraging healthy cardiovascular function and blood flow [16].

Taurine | 1,300 mg

Taurine is another staple pre-workout ingredient with diverse benefits for athletes and gym-goers. For one, taurine is a potent nootropic that confers synergy with caffeine to promote focus and reduce brain cell inflammation and oxidative stress [17, 18]. 

Taurine can also enhance physical performance via increased blood flow to skeletal muscle tissue [19, 20]. Greater blood flow to muscle tissue encourages a favorable milieu for muscle function and recovery during training. Additionally, taurine supplementation has been shown to improve performance in endurance athletes [21].

L-Tyrosine | 1,000 mg

L-tyrosine is a conditionally essential amino acid that serves as a precursor to dopamine and norepinephrine, two neurotransmitters that govern motivation and reward. Research shows that supplementing with L-tyrosine can significantly enhance cognitive performance, especially under acutely stressful situations (such as intense training) [22]. L-Tyrosine has also been shown to improve “cognitive flexibility,” meaning it can help you adapt to changing cognitive demands without letting extraneous thoughts take over [23].

AlphaSize® Alpha-GPC | 300 mg

Alpha-GPC (glycerylphosphorylcholine) is a popular nootropic supplement and a bioavailable source of choline, an essential micronutrient for cholinergic transmission and, by extension, cognitive function. Alpha-GPC is primarily found in the brain and is one of the two major storage forms of choline in the cytosol (interior space of cells), along with phosphocholine [24].

This ingredient can enhance physical and mental performance by increasing acetylcholine and growth hormone production [25, 26, 27]. The former is important for focus and mental acuity, while the latter promotes fatty acid oxidation and reduces muscle tissue breakdown. As such, alpha-GPC (as patented AlphaSize®) is one of the key ingredients in Bulk Pre-Workout.

PurCaf® Organic Caffeine | 200 mg

While most pre-workouts contain synthetic caffeine anhydrous, we formulated BULK Pre-Workout with organic caffeine derived from green coffee beans (as PurCaf®). On the molecular level, caffeine (chemically known as 1,3,7-trimethylxanthine) is an alkaline, organic substance derived from xanthine — a biologically important purine base found in many bodily tissues and fluids. Methylxanthines like caffeine and theobromine stimulate the central nervous system (CNS) and heart to promote wakefulness and motivation.

Numerous studies have shown that taking caffeine before exercise can significantly improve overall performance, largely by reducing the rate of perceived exertion [28]. Caffeine may also enhance endurance and strength by increasing fatty acid oxidation and sparing muscle glycogen [29].

L-Theanine | 200 mg

L-theanine is an isomer of the amino acids L-glutamate and L-glutamine. It was discovered centuries ago as one of the primary amino acids in green tea leaves and is also found in various mushroom species.

L-theanine is highly bioavailable when taken orally and actively traverses the blood-brain barrier to enhance mental acuity and attenuate stress [30, 31]. Its nootropic effects are appropriately described as "alert relaxation," which is to say it promotes a sense of calmness while improving focus. L-theanine can also help take the edge off of stimulants, particularly caffeine. In fact, research shows that pairing L-theanine with caffeine creates a nootropic synergy that bolsters cognitive function and alertness more effectively than taking either nootropic on its own [32].

Theobromine | 50 mg

Theobromine is the primary alkaloid found in cocoa beans and is essentially the “little brother” of caffeine. Its functions in the body are suggested to be complementary to those of caffeine, acting as a phosphodiesterase inhibitor and central nervous system stimulant [33].

Research has also found that theobromine has differential contributions to mood and cognitive function compared to caffeine, providing further insight into the distinct yet synergistic nature of these naturally occurring stimulants [34].

SenActiv® | 50 mg

The distinguished adaptogens that comprise SenActiv® are Panax notoginseng root and rose hips (Rosa roxburghii). The notoginseng in SenActiv® is highly concentrated in notoginsenoside R1, a beneficial compound that helps accelerate muscle recovery during/after intense exercise. Likewise, the rose hips provide several ginsenoside-like molecules that confer synergistic recovery-enhancing effects with ginsenoside R1 [35]. These phytonutrients are suggested to work by bolstering a cellular "cleaning" process known as autophagy, particularly in skeletal muscle cells [36, 37, 38].

BioPerine® | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [39, 40]. Hence, BioPerine® helps your body better absorb and utilize the other active ingredients in BULK Pre-Workout.

Boron Citrate | 3,000 mcg (3 mg)

Boron is an important trace mineral with numerous roles in the human body. Recent evidence suggests that men who supplement with boron daily have higher levels of testosterone and lower levels of estradiol (estrogen) than those who don’t [41].

Zinc Chelate | 10 mg

Chelated zinc is a bioavailable source of zinc, an essential cofactor for various enzymes. Research suggests zinc is crucial for supporting fertility and sperm cell counts in men [42]. This is largely because zinc aids in natural testosterone production, and males who are zinc deficient are at a higher risk of infertility [43].

Vitamins B6 and B12 | 5 mg and 100 mcg

Vitamins, as a collective group, are essential micronutrients that act as coenzymes (read: "helper molecules") for enzymes throughout the body. Vitamins B6 and B12 are water-soluble vitamins that are particularly important for cognitive function, cardiovascular health, nutrient metabolism, and immunity [44, 45]. As such, you can't go wrong with having these in your pre-workout arsenal.

Sodium and Potassium | 180 mg and 125 mg

Many minerals act as electrolytes in aqueous solutions, meaning they carry an electric charge that influences concentration gradients across cellular membranes and enzyme functions. Sodium and potassium are arguably the most important electrolyte minerals, being well-known to impact hydration status and exercise performance [46].

How to Use

For Beginners: To assess tolerance, mix 1/2 scoop with 6 to 8 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach. If the effects feel subtle, increase to a full scoop before the next workout.

For Experienced Pre-Workout Users: Mix 1 full scoop with 10 to 12 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach.

Third-Party Testing

Please click below for third-party testing results from the most recent batch of Bulk Pre-Workout:

FAQs

What Does BULK Pre-Workout Do?

As with most pre-workouts, BULK is designed with your performance in mind, helping you push harder for longer in the gym. For more insights into how the BULK Pre-Workout formula actually works, please see the ingredient overviews above.

How Long Does BULK Pre-Workout Last For?

Each container has 30 servings; for most gym-goers, that will last 30-40 workouts, depending on how large of a scoop you take.

How should PreSeries BULK be Taken to Maximize its Effectiveness?

To maximize the effectiveness of Bulk Pre-Workout, aim to finish drinking your dose 15-30 minutes prior to your workout. This should give the product plenty of time to "kick in." In terms of how much water to drink with BULK Pre-Workout, we recommend mixing 6-10 fl. oz of water with 1/2 scoop (to assess tolerance) and mixing 12-16 fl. oz of water with 1 full scoop.

Can I Take BULK Pre-Workout if I am Subjected to Drug Testing for my Sport?

Yes, absolutely. Transparent Labs Bulk Pre-Workout contains zero banned substances and is Informed Choice certified for athletes.

Why Doesn't BULK Pre-Workout Contain Creatine?

Large doses of caffeine may interfere with the ergogenic effects of creatine [47]; since BULK Pre-Workout contains caffeine, we decided to keep the creatine separate.

What is the Difference Between Transparent Labs BULK, LEAN, and STIM-FREE Pre Workout?

PreSeries BULK is designed to support lean muscle growth and includes testosterone-supporting micronutrients, while PreSeries LEAN is designed to support fat loss and includes a thyroid support complex. PreSeries STIM-FREE, as the name suggests, contains zero stimulants and has added elevATP® for energy production.

I Don't Live in the United States, Can I Still Buy PreSeries BULK?

Yes - our fulfillment center allows us to ship worldwide (with some exceptions due to fraudulent activity in certain countries; see here for more info). Standard shipping for international orders typically takes 10-14 business days to arrive.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

No! While Transparent Labs Bulk Pre-Workout is manufactured in a facility that processes nuts (coconuts and peanuts), we have an allergen control program that requires sanitization and cleaning of the manufacturing equipment to avoid cross-contamination of allergenic and hypoallergenic materials.

Forslean, on the other hand, has been linked to preserving and promoting lean body mass, which can aid in maintaining a caloric deficit.

There’s no such thing as a “magic pill.” By avoiding crash diets and ill-advised fasts and building a lifestyle centered around proper nutrition and a consistent resistance training program, any fitness goal is attainable over time. PhysiqueSeries Recomp is designed to give you that extra mental focus and energy to see your body composition goal through to the finish line.

Carnosine is an endogenous dipeptide that functions as a buffer in muscle cells, thereby attenuating the accumulation of acidic byproducts of muscular exertion (e.g. lactate and hydrogen ions) [7]. Hence, bolstering muscle carnosine levels—via beta-alanine—allows you to push yourself longer and harder in the gym.

Pre-workout supplements almost always contain beta-alanine but in inefficacious doses. We made sure to include a full clinical dose of beta-alanine (4,000 mg) in every scoop of BULK Pre-Workout. Relevant evidence-based benefits of beta-alanine include:

  • Delaying the onset of neuromuscular fatigue during intense exercise [8]

  • Increasing overall muscle strength [9] 

  • Improving muscle endurance and total work capacity [10]

  • Reducing and combatting the formation of dysfunctional proteins and promoting the formation of healthy proteins [11]

  • Significantly increasing lean muscle mass as part of a diligent resistance-training program [12]

*Note that beta-alanine causes a benign tingling sensation known as paresthesia while the body acclimates to higher carnosine levels. This effect is harmless and gradually lessens with consistent use.

BetaPure™ Betaine Anhydrous | 2,500 mg

Betaine, also known as trimethylglycine, is a naturally occurring metabolite that serves as a methyl donor and osmolyte in the body. Though the mechanisms are not entirely understood, betaine supplementation has shown promise in enhancing power output and, to a lesser extent, endurance capacity in athletes [13, 14, 15]. It is plausible that betaine supplementation promotes athletic performance by maintaining cellular hydration and reducing homocysteine levels, thereby encouraging healthy cardiovascular function and blood flow [16].

Taurine | 1,300 mg

Taurine is another staple pre-workout ingredient with diverse benefits for athletes and gym-goers. For one, taurine is a potent nootropic that confers synergy with caffeine to promote focus and reduce brain cell inflammation and oxidative stress [17, 18]. 

Taurine can also enhance physical performance via increased blood flow to skeletal muscle tissue [19, 20]. Greater blood flow to muscle tissue encourages a favorable milieu for muscle function and recovery during training. Additionally, taurine supplementation has been shown to improve performance in endurance athletes [21].

L-Tyrosine | 1,000 mg

L-tyrosine is a conditionally essential amino acid and precursor to dopamine and norepinephrine, two neurotransmitters that govern motivation and reward. Research shows that supplementing with L-tyrosine can significantly enhance cognitive performance, especially under acutely stressful situations (such as intense training) [22]. L-Tyrosine has also been shown to improve “cognitive flexibility,” meaning it can help you adapt to changing cognitive demands without letting extraneous thoughts take over [23].

AlphaSize® Alpha-GPC | 300 mg

Alpha-GPC (glycerylphosphorylcholine) is a popular nootropic supplement and a bioavailable source of choline, an essential micronutrient for cholinergic transmission and, by extension, cognitive function. Alpha-GPC is primarily found in the brain and is one of the two major storage forms of choline in the cytosol (interior space of cells), along with phosphocholine [24].

This ingredient can enhance physical and mental performance by increasing acetylcholine and growth hormone production [25, 26, 27]. The former is important for focus and mental acuity, while the latter promotes fatty acid oxidation and reduces muscle tissue breakdown. As such, alpha-GPC (as patented AlphaSize®) is one of the key ingredients in Bulk Pre-Workout.

PurCaf® Organic Caffeine | 275 mg

While most pre-workouts contain synthetic caffeine anhydrous, we formulated BULK Black Pre-Workout with organic caffeine derived from green coffee beans (as PurCaf®). On the molecular level, caffeine (chemically known as 1,3,7-trimethylxanthine) is an alkaline, organic substance derived from xanthine — a biologically important purine base found in many bodily tissues and fluids. Methylxanthines like caffeine and theobromine stimulate the central nervous system (CNS) and heart to promote wakefulness and motivation.

Numerous studies have shown that taking caffeine before exercise can significantly improve overall performance, largely by reducing the rate of perceived exertion [28]. Caffeine may also enhance endurance and strength by increasing fatty acid oxidation and sparing muscle glycogen [29].

L-Theanine | 200 mg

L-theanine is an isomer of the amino acids L-glutamate and L-glutamine. It was discovered centuries ago as one of the primary amino acids in green tea leaves and is also found in various mushroom species.

L-theanine is highly bioavailable when taken orally and actively traverses the blood-brain barrier to enhance mental acuity and attenuate stress [30, 31]. Its nootropic effects are appropriately described as "alert relaxation," which is to say it promotes a sense of calmness while improving focus. L-theanine can also help take the edge off of stimulants, particularly caffeine. In fact, research shows that pairing L-theanine with caffeine creates a nootropic synergy that bolsters cognitive function and alertness more effectively than taking either nootropic on its own [32].

Theobromine | 100 mg

Theobromine is the primary alkaloid found in cocoa beans and is essentially the “little brother” of caffeine. Its functions in the body are suggested to be complementary to those of caffeine, acting as a phosphodiesterase inhibitor and central nervous system stimulant [33].

Research has also found that theobromine has differential contributions to mood and cognitive function compared to caffeine, providing further insight into the distinct yet synergistic nature of these naturally occurring stimulants [34].

Infinergy™ Di-Caffeine Malate | 75 mg

Infinergy™ is a trademarked form of sustained-release caffeine (as di-caffeine malate) that delivers the same mental and physical performance benefits as normal caffeine but with a longer duration of action. In other words, Infinergy™ helps take you the extra mile when you need it most.

SenActiv® | 50 mg

SenActiv® is a patented adaptogenic herb combination featuring Panax notoginseng and rose hips (Rosa roxburghii). The Panax notoginseng in SenActiv® is highly concentrated in ginsenoside R1, a beneficial constituent that helps accelerate muscle recovery during/after intense exercise. Likewise, the rose hips in this ingredient provide several ginsenoside-like molecules that confer synergistic recovery-enhancing effects with ginsenoside R1 [35]. These phytonutrients are suggested to work by bolstering a cellular "cleaning" process known as autophagy, particularly in skeletal muscle cells [36, 37, 38].

BioPerine® | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [39, 40]. Hence, BioPerine® helps your body better absorb and utilize the other active ingredients in Bulk Black Pre-Workout.

Boron Citrate | 3,000 mcg (3 mg)

Boron is an important trace mineral with numerous roles in the human body. Recent evidence suggests that men who supplement with boron daily have higher levels of testosterone and lower levels of estradiol (estrogen) than those who don’t [41].

Zinc Chelate | 10 mg

Chelated zinc is a bioavailable source of zinc, an essential cofactor for various enzymes. Research suggests zinc is crucial for supporting fertility and sperm cell counts in men [42]. This is largely because zinc aids in natural testosterone production, and males who are zinc deficient are at a higher risk of infertility [43].

Vitamins B6 and B12 | 5 mg and 100 mcg

Vitamins, as a collective group, are essential micronutrients that act as coenzymes (read: "helper molecules") for enzymes throughout the body. Vitamins B6 and B12 are water-soluble vitamins that are particularly important for cognitive function, cardiovascular health, nutrient metabolism, and immunity [44, 45]. As such, you can't go wrong with having these in your pre-workout arsenal.

Sodium and Potassium | 180 mg and 125 mg

Many minerals act as electrolytes in aqueous solutions, meaning they carry an electric charge that influences concentration gradients across cellular membranes and enzyme functions. Sodium and potassium are arguably the most important electrolyte minerals, being well-known to impact hydration status and exercise performance [46].

How to Use

For Beginners

To assess tolerance, mix 1/2 scoop of Bulk Black Pre-Workout with 6 to 8 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach. If the effects feel subtle, increase to a full scoop before the next workout.

For Experienced Pre-Workout Users

Mix 1 full scoop of Bulk Black Pre-Workout with 10 to 12 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach.

FAQs

What is the Difference Between Bulk and Bulk Black?

Bulk Black contains a stronger dose of caffeine and theobromine and has added Infinergy™ sustained-release caffeine. The formulas are otherwise the same.

How Much Caffeine is in Bulk Black?

Bulk Black contains approximately 305 mg of caffeine per serving, from organic green coffee beans and di-caffeine malate.

Does Transparent Labs Bulk Black have Creatine?

No, this pre-workout formula does not contain creatine.

How Should Bulk Black Pre Workout be Taken to Maximize its Effectiveness?

In terms of timing, we recommend taking Bulk Black 20-30 minutes prior to your workout. In terms of how much water to drink with Bulk Black, we recommend mixing 8-12 fl. oz of water with 1/2 scoop (to assess tolerance) and mixing 16-24 fl. oz of water with 1 full scoop.

I am Subjected to Drug Testing for my Sport, Can I Take PreSeries Bulk Black Pre-Workout?

Yes, absolutely. Transparent Labs Bulk Black Pre-Workout contains zero banned substances and is Informed Choice certified for athletes.

Why Doesn't Bulk Black Contain Creatine?

Large doses of caffeine may interfere with the ergogenic effects of creatine [47]; since Bulk Black Pre-Workout contains caffeine, we decided to keep the creatine separate.

What is the difference between PreSeries Bulk Black, PreSeries Lean, and PreSeries Stim-Free?

Bulk Black is designed to support lean muscle growth and includes a testosterone support complex, while Lean pre-workout is designed to support fat loss and includes a thyroid support complex. Stim-Free, as the name suggests, contains zero stimulants and has added elevATP. If you want to see how we compare Bulk Black to other well-rated pre-workouts, check out our best pre-workout blog post here.

I Don't Live in the United States, Can I Still Buy PreSeries BULK?

Yes - our fulfillment center allows us to ship worldwide (with some exceptions due to fraudulent activity in certain countries; see here for more info). Standard shipping for international orders typically takes 10-14 business days to arrive.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

No! While Transparent Labs Bulk Black Pre-Workout is manufactured in a facility that processes nuts (coconuts and peanuts), our allergen control program requires sanitizing and cleaning of the manufacturing equipment to avoid cross-contamination of allergenic and hypoallergenic materials.

L-theanine is an isomer of the amino acids L-glutamate and L-glutamine. It was discovered centuries ago as one of the primary amino acids in green tea leaves and is also found in various mushroom species.

L-theanine is highly bioavailable when taken orally and actively traverses the blood-brain barrier to enhance mental acuity and attenuate stress [30, 31]. Its nootropic effects are appropriately described as "alert relaxation," which is to say it promotes a sense of calmness while improving focus. L-theanine can also help take the edge off of stimulants, particularly caffeine. In fact, research shows that pairing L-theanine with caffeine creates a nootropic synergy that bolsters cognitive function and alertness more effectively than taking either nootropic on its own [32].

Theobromine | 50 mg

Theobromine is the primary alkaloid found in cocoa beans and is essentially the “little brother” of caffeine. Its functions in the body are suggested to be complementary to those of caffeine, acting as a phosphodiesterase inhibitor and central nervous system stimulant [33].

Research has also found that theobromine has differential contributions to mood and cognitive function compared to caffeine, providing further insight into the distinct yet synergistic nature of these naturally occurring stimulants [34].

SenActiv® | 50 mg

The distinguished adaptogens that comprise SenActiv® are Panax notoginseng root and rose hips (Rosa roxburghii). The notoginseng in SenActiv® is highly concentrated in notoginsenoside R1, a beneficial compound that helps accelerate muscle recovery during/after intense exercise. Likewise, the rose hips provide several ginsenoside-like molecules that confer synergistic recovery-enhancing effects with ginsenoside R1 [35]. These phytonutrients are suggested to work by bolstering a cellular "cleaning" process known as autophagy, particularly in skeletal muscle cells [36, 37, 38].

BioPerine® | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [39, 40]. Hence, BioPerine® helps your body better absorb and utilize the other active ingredients in BULK Pre-Workout.

Boron Citrate | 3,000 mcg (3 mg)

Boron is an important trace mineral with numerous roles in the human body. Recent evidence suggests that men who supplement with boron daily have higher levels of testosterone and lower levels of estradiol (estrogen) than those who don’t [41].

Zinc Chelate | 10 mg

Chelated zinc is a bioavailable source of zinc, an essential cofactor for various enzymes. Research suggests zinc is crucial for supporting fertility and sperm cell counts in men [42]. This is largely because zinc aids in natural testosterone production, and males who are zinc deficient are at a higher risk of infertility [43].

Vitamins B6 and B12 | 5 mg and 100 mcg

Vitamins, as a collective group, are essential micronutrients that act as coenzymes (read: "helper molecules") for enzymes throughout the body. Vitamins B6 and B12 are water-soluble vitamins that are particularly important for cognitive function, cardiovascular health, nutrient metabolism, and immunity [44, 45]. As such, you can't go wrong with having these in your pre-workout arsenal.

Sodium and Potassium | 180 mg and 125 mg

Many minerals act as electrolytes in aqueous solutions, meaning they carry an electric charge that influences concentration gradients across cellular membranes and enzyme functions. Sodium and potassium are arguably the most important electrolyte minerals, being well-known to impact hydration status and exercise performance [46].

How to Use

For Beginners: To assess tolerance, mix 1/2 scoop with 6 to 8 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach. If the effects feel subtle, increase to a full scoop before the next workout.

For Experienced Pre-Workout Users: Mix 1 full scoop with 10 to 12 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach.

Third-Party Testing

Please click below for third-party testing results from the most recent batch of Bulk Pre-Workout:

FAQs

What Does BULK Pre-Workout Do?

As with most pre-workouts, BULK is designed with your performance in mind, helping you push harder for longer in the gym. For more insights into how the BULK Pre-Workout formula actually works, please see the ingredient overviews above.

How Long Does BULK Pre-Workout Last For?

Each container has 30 servings; for most gym-goers, that will last 30-40 workouts, depending on how large of a scoop you take.

How should PreSeries BULK be Taken to Maximize its Effectiveness?

To maximize the effectiveness of Bulk Pre-Workout, aim to finish drinking your dose 15-30 minutes prior to your workout. This should give the product plenty of time to "kick in." In terms of how much water to drink with BULK Pre-Workout, we recommend mixing 6-10 fl. oz of water with 1/2 scoop (to assess tolerance) and mixing 12-16 fl. oz of water with 1 full scoop.

Can I Take BULK Pre-Workout if I am Subjected to Drug Testing for my Sport?

Yes, absolutely. Transparent Labs Bulk Pre-Workout contains zero banned substances and is Informed Choice certified for athletes.

Why Doesn't BULK Pre-Workout Contain Creatine?

Large doses of caffeine may interfere with the ergogenic effects of creatine [47]; since BULK Pre-Workout contains caffeine, we decided to keep the creatine separate.

What is the Difference Between Transparent Labs BULK, LEAN, and STIM-FREE Pre Workout?

PreSeries BULK is designed to support lean muscle growth and includes testosterone-supporting micronutrients, while PreSeries LEAN is designed to support fat loss and includes a thyroid support complex. PreSeries STIM-FREE, as the name suggests, contains zero stimulants and has added elevATP® for energy production.

Yes - our fulfillment center allows us to ship worldwide (with some exceptions due to fraudulent activity in certain countries; see here for more info). Standard shipping for international orders typically takes 10-14 business days to arrive.

No! While Transparent Labs Bulk Pre-Workout is manufactured in a facility that processes nuts (coconuts and peanuts), we have an allergen control program that requires sanitization and cleaning of the manufacturing equipment to avoid cross-contamination of allergenic and hypoallergenic materials.

name: Cognition
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs Cognition is a high-performance, evidence-based nootropic supplement featuring four key ingredients that support healthy cognitive function: Rhodiolife® (Rhodiola rosea extract), Cognizin® (citicoline), SerinAid® (phosphatidylserine), and PurCaf® (organic caffeine). This formula also contains B vitamins, L-theanine, and huperzine-A to complement overall brain health. 

So-called "brain supplements" are myriad nowadays, given the convincing evidence that cognitive and behavioural disturbances can be alleviated with not only prescription drugs but also natural ingredients. However, many brain health supplements lack evidence-based nootropics, instead relying on experimental compounds with questionable efficacy and safety.

Our Cognition supplement includes patented and proven ingredients tested in human clinical trials for improving cognitive performance (e.g., working memory and mental alertness), brain function, stress resilience, mood, and more! And with just the right amount of caffeine, Cognition helps you dial in and focus without feeling overstimulated or jittery.

Key Features

Supports Cognitive Function and Mental Energy: Cognition is meticulously crafted with evidence-based ingredients such as Cognizin®, SerinAid®, and Rhodiolife® that work synergistically to fortify your mental performance and acuity starting with the very first dose.

Improves Motivation and Drive: By controlling cortisol levels and supporting dopamine production, Cognition contributes to greater motivation and drive so you can conquer the day ahead.

Enhance Stress-Resiliency and Mood: The adaptogens and nootropics in Cognition help the body and brain become more resilient to psychological and physical stressors, encouraging a balanced mood throughout the day.

Stackable with Pre-Workout Formulas for Enhanced Focus: Cognition can be stacked with your favorite pre-workout supplement to bolster focus and drive during training. (Note that Cognition provides 100 mg of caffeine per serving, so take this into account when combining with caffeinated pre-workouts.)

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of Cognition is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Rhodiolife® (Rhodiola rosea Root Extract, 5% Rosavins) | 600 mg

Rhodiolife® is the world’s first standardized Rhodiola rosea extract to be made commercially available. This patented ingredient is developed by Nektium Pharma and is 100% identity guaranteed, ensuring authenticity and potency with 5% rosavins and 1.8% salidroside (the key beneficial constituents in Rhodiola).

As a prestigious adaptogenic herb, Rhodiola rosea has been increasingly studied as a natural treatment for various mental health conditions (e.g., generalized anxiety disorder and moderate depression) with promising results [1]. The roots of Rhodiola rosea are enriched in numerous phytonutrients—notably rosavins and salidroside—that possess many putative health benefits, including:

  • Improving cognitive deficiencies and depressive symptoms [2, 3]

  • Enhancing the immune system [4]

  • Promoting exercise performance [5, 6]

  • Supporting healthy blood pressure levels and cerebral blood flow [7]

Cognizin® Citicholine (CDP-Choline) | 250 mg

Cognizin® is a patented form of choline known as citicoline, or cytidine diphosphate (CDP)-choline, the industry’s gold standard for choline supplementation. Choline is an essential B vitamin becoming increasingly scarce in the modern human diet [8]. It plays a vital role in acetylcholine synthesis, the primary neurotransmitter governing cognitive function and mental acuity when handling tasks that demand sharp focus and concentration.

While you can find many nootropic supplements with choline, they almost always contain choline bitartrate, which has negligible impact on choline levels in the brain [9].

On the contrary, a recent human clinical trial found that subjects given a CDP-choline supplement experienced a two-fold increase in plasma levels of both choline and uridine for over 10 hours—this improved performance on mentally demanding tasks like memory tests and interpretation [10]. Moreover, choline and uridine work synergistically to synthesize phospholipid precursors that protect brain cells, thereby supporting neuronal function and integrity [11].

SerinAid® (70% Phosphatidylserine) | 200 mg

SerinAid® is the purest and most potent phosphatidylserine ingredient on the market, derived exclusively from plant sources. Phosphatidylserine is an important phospholipid that protects neurons and glial cells in the brain and acts as a cellular signaling molecule to keep the mind sharp [11].

Recent research reviews contend phosphatidylserine supplementation may help alleviate mild cognitive impairment and improve memory [12, 13]. Further evidence shows phosphatidylserine administration attenuates stress-induced cortisol spikes, thus supporting mood and adrenal balance [14, 15].

PurCaf® Organic Caffeine (from Green Coffee Bean) | 100 mg

While many nootropic supplements contain synthetic caffeine, we formulated Cognition with organic caffeine derived from green coffee beans (as PurCaf®). On the molecular level, caffeine (chemically known as 1,3,7-trimethylxanthine) is an alkaline, organic substance derived from xanthine — a biologically important purine base found in many bodily tissues and fluids. Methylxanthines like caffeine stimulate the central nervous system (CNS) and heart to promote wakefulness and motivation.

Numerous studies have shown that taking caffeine can significantly improve overall cognitive performance and may even reduce the risk of neurodegenerative conditions [16, 17].

L-Theanine | 100 mg

L-theanine is a green-tea-derived amino acid that readily traverses the blood-brain barrier to exert nootropic effects [18]. When combined with caffeine, L-theanine demonstrates many benefits for cognitive faculties, such as increasing reaction time, attention, and memory [19]. It also reduces jitters in caffeine-sensitive individuals and promotes relaxation without affecting wakefulness and energy [20]

Huperzine-A (from Huperzia serrata Leaf Extract) | 300 mcg

A powerful nootropic, huperzine-A is a naturally occurring alkaloid found primarily in the firmoss Huperzia serrata. It has long been revered for its ability to boost cognitive function.

Research has shown that huperzine-A is a potent inhibitor of acetylcholinesterase, thereby prolonging the actions of acetylcholine [21]. This results in heightened mental acuity and a greater capacity to memorize and recall information.

B Vitamin Complex (Vitamins B6, B9, and B12)

B vitamins in Cognition are the key cofactors in synthesizing several neurotransmitters, including serotonin, gamma-aminobutyric acid (GABA), and dopamine. Clinical research has shown that regular B vitamin supplementation can help protect the brain from neurodegeneration and bolster mental performance, suggesting the role of these micronutrients in long-term brain health [22].

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, take one serving (2 capsules) once daily with 6 to 8 fl. oz of water/liquid, preferably on an empty stomach.

Optimal Consumption Times

We recommend taking one serving mid-morning (between breakfast and lunch) to support cognitive function throughout the day. An additional serving may be taken in the late afternoon if you need help focusing throughout the evening.

Note: This product contains 100 mg of natural caffeine per serving—avoid taking it within five hours of bedtime.

FAQs

What are the benefits of TL Cognition?

The evidence-based benefits of the ingredients in this product include:

  • Improving cognitive faculties (e.g., reasoning, focus/attention, and memory).

  • Increasing perceived energy levels (i.e,. the “pep” you feel after ingesting caffeine).

  • Enhancing mood and motivation so you can stay productive and tackle the day ahead.

  • Supporting the body’s resiliency to stressful conditions.

Will this product help with memory loss and age-related cognitive impairment?

TL Cognition is formulated to support cognitive function and nourish brain cells with beneficial micronutrients, such as choline, phosphatidylserine, and rosavins. While randomized clinical trials in healthy adults suggest these nutrients may be useful for preventing cognitive decline and improving cognitive faculties, TL Cognition—like all dietary supplements—is not intended to treat, cure, or diagnose medical conditions. It's important to talk to your doctor if you're concerned about cognitive decline and/or your mental health.

How do I tell if I'm at risk of Alzheimer's disease and other cognitive dysfunctions?

Detecting cognitive decline in the early stages remains tricky from a clinical perspective. Still, it's important to check with your primary care physician or another qualified healthcare practitioner if you suspect something is off, as they can test for biomarkers in cerebrospinal fluid.

name: Cortisol Balance
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Cortisol Balance is a comprehensive stress-relief formula featuring clinically studied ingredients, including Shoden® Ashwagandha, SerinAid® phosphatidylserine, Relora® (Magnolia officinalis and Phellodendron amurense), and BioPerine® (black pepper fruit extract). These unique adaptogenic herbs and phosphatidylserine support overall well-being and mood by balancing stress hormones, primarily cortisol, and modulating the hypothalamic-pituitary-adrenal (HPA) axis. In turn, this can promote numerous health benefits and reduce stress levels.

Key Features

Supports Healthy Cortisol Levels and Well-Being: Sometimes life gets crazy, and the stress that comes with it can throw our cortisol levels out of whack. The evidence-based ingredients in Cortisol Balance help turn the table around and make the body more resilient to stress by keeping cortisol levels in check.

Relieve Physical and Mental Stress: Elevated cortisol levels are associated with chronic stress, and vice versa. Our Cortisol Balance formula helps manage stress by providing targeted nutrients that modulate the brain and nervous system to lower cortisol levels.

Improve Sleep Quality and Immune System Function: When the body produces excess cortisol, it can impair immune function and make it harder to get a good night's rest. By encouraging more stable cortisol levels, Cortisol Balance supports deeper, more restorative sleep and a stronger immune system, ultimately contributing to a healthy lifestyle. 

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

SerinAid® (70% Phosphatidylserine) | 400 mg

SerinAid® is a high-purity form of phosphatidylserine, an essential phospholipid nutrient found in the cell membranes of plants and animals. Research has demonstrated that phosphatidylserine supplementation can attenuate the rise in cortisol levels induced by physical stress, thereby modulating the stress response and promoting a state of calm.

For example, a recent study published in the journal Hormone and Metabolic Research found that phosphatidylserine significantly reduced cortisol levels in response to exercise-induced stress, suggesting its promise for stress management. 

Relora® (Proprietary Blend of Magnolia officinalis and Phellodendron amurense) | 250 mg

Relora® is a patented blend of extracts from Magnolia officinalis and Phellodendron amurense, two botanicals traditionally used in Asian medicine. These extracts have been studied for their potential to mitigate stress and anxiety.

Clinical trials indicate that Relora® can effectively reduce cortisol levels and improve mood states in individuals experiencing chronic stress in as few as four weeks.

Shoden® Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) | 60 mg

Shoden® is a highly potent extract of Ashwagandha, standardized to an unmatched 35% withanolide glycosides. Ashwagandha is a renowned adaptogenic herb that has long been used in Ayurvedic medicine to enhance resilience to stress.

The numerous therapeutic properties of ashwagandha stem from its ability to reduce cortisol levels and help the body successfully adapt to stressful conditions . In turn, ashwagandha supplementation may promote mental clarity, a better mood, healthy sexual function, muscle recovery, and more.

BioPerine® Black Pepper Fruit Extract | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [RR, RR].

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, take two (2) capsules one to two times daily, preferably on an empty stomach.

Optimal Consumption Times

We recommend taking one serving in the mid-morning (between breakfast and lunch) and another serving 1-2 hours before bedtime.

FAQs

What Are the Benefits of Cortisol Balance?

This formula can provide a range of benefits by helping reduce the stress hormone cortisol and promoting overall adrenal function.

Cortisol is the primary glucocorticoid in humans. It is a type of steroid hormone produced in the adrenal glands, regulating metabolism, development, immune function, and cognition/alertness. While cortisol is an essential hormone necessary to sustain life,  too much (or too little) of it can wreak havoc on bodily systems.

Will this Product Fix a Cortisol Imbalance?

The answer to this depends on the degree of "imbalance" you're experiencing and numerous other factors (e.g. eating a healthy diet, taking prescription medications, and having underlying health conditions). Since this product is a nutritional supplement, it is not intended to treat, cure, or diagnose any medical conditions. It's important to talk to your doctor if you're concerned about elevated cortisol levels and/or your mental health.

Do Anxiety Medications Help with Cortisol?

Most anxiety medications target GABA receptors or monoamine transporters (e.g. selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors). These medications may have downstream effects that slightly decrease cortisol levels and reduce stress, but that is not their primary mechanism of action.

How Do I Tell if I Have High Cortisol?

Your primary care doctor can order the appropriate lab work, such as a salivary cortisol test, to assess your cortisol/adrenal functions.

name: Creatine HMB
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs Creatine HMB is an evidence-based step forward for creatine supplementation, which is well-known to enhance muscle growth and athletic performance (e.g. muscle endurance and strength).

This formula harnesses the synergy of creatine monohydrate—the most studied form of creatine—and a naturally occurring metabolite known as beta-hydroxy-beta-methylbutyrate (HMB), the latter of which helps reduce muscle damage and muscle protein breakdown. Creatine HMB is rounded out with BioPerine®, an absorption enhancer, and vitamin D3 for comprehensive muscle recovery.

Key Features:

  • 30 Servings Per Container: Each tub of Creatine HMB contains one month's worth of clinically dosed creatine monohydrate, HMB (as MyHMB™), vitamin D3, and BioPerine® to promote athletic performance and increase lean muscle mass.

  • Zero Artificial Additives: Our formula is free from artificial sweeteners, colored dyes, unnecessary fillers, and harmful additives. Instead, we use natural flavors and stevia to satisfy your taste buds without compromising your health.

  • Evidence-Based Synergy: Recent studies (cited below) have shown that creatine monohydrate and HMB significantly improve lean body mass and muscle strength gains beyond creatine or HMB supplementation alone.

  • Versatile Creatine Supplement: Being beneficial for both anaerobic and aerobic performance, Transparent Labs Creatine HMB is suitable for active individuals, gym-goers, and athletes with all types of training goals.

  • Flavors for Everyone: Choose from 13 deliciously refreshing fruit flavors, catering to every palate.

  • Vegan-Friendly Formula: Creatine HMB is crafted with vegan-friendly ingredients to help you perform better, recover quicker, and build/maintain lean muscle mass.

  • Third-Party Tested for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of Transparent Labs Creatine HMB is third-party tested for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

*Doses listed are per serving

Creatine Monohydrate | 5,000 mg

The performance-enhancing (ergogenic) effects of creatine supplementation are irrefutable and well-established in scientific literature. Supplementation with creatine (monohydrate) works by increasing the amount of creatine within your muscle cells (called "muscle creatine stores").

The additional creatine supply in your muscles serves as a reservoir of adenosine triphosphate (ATP), especially during intense and enduring exercise. Hence, creatine supplementation is consistently shown to improve athletic performance and body composition when combined with resistance training [1]. 

Notable Studies Referencing the Effects of Creatine:

An updated review from the Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition suggests that creatine supplementation combined with resistance training significantly improves training adaptations (at a cellular and subcellular level), which may lead to increased strength, accelerated recovery time, and enhanced body composition [2]. Several meta-analyses have confirmed these ergogenic effects of creatine supplementation [3, 4, 5, 6].

In addition, long- and short-term creatine supplementation has been shown to increase muscle mass (and potentially reduce fat mass) in active individuals [7].

β-Hydroxy β-Methylbutyrate (as MyHMB™) | 1,500 mg

Beta-hydroxy-beta-methylbutyrate (HMB), a metabolite of the essential amino acid leucine, has been extensively studied for its potential benefits on muscle mass, strength, and exercise performance, with promising results [8]. When combined with creatine monohydrate, HMB may confer additive effects leading to further improvements in body composition, physical performance, and recovery time [9].

Notable Clinical Studies Referencing the Effects of HMB:

A nine-week, randomized, controlled trial of healthy, resistance-trained men found that HMB supplementation had a clear bolstering effect on fat-free mass and substantially strengthened lower-body muscles compared to the placebo group [10].

Another study on college students concluded that HMB supplementation positively affects selected components of aerobic performance (such as muscular endurance) [11]. This study is centered around the effects of HMB supplementation on oxygen capacity for endurance athletes, which found that blood glucose was significantly greater during HMB use and concludes that HMB supplementation may have positive effects on performance [12].

Lastly, a recent meta-analysis demonstrated that older adults may benefit from HMB supplementation as it can help prevent muscle loss due to aging [13].

BioPerine® | 5 mg

The black pepper plant (Piper nigrum) is a flowering vine that bears fruits (peppercorns) containing roughly 2-7.4% piperine by mass. In comparison, BioPerine®, a standardized extract of black pepper, contains a minimum 95% piperine by mass. Hence, as little as 5 mg BioPerine® provides as much piperine as 250 mg of most black pepper spices. (For reference, 1/4 teaspoon of ground black pepper weighs about 500 mg.)

Piperine, the major alkaloid found in black pepper, has been an emphasis of research in recent years due to its promising bioavailability-enhancing properties [14]. In other words, supplementing with BioPerine® helps increase the amount of active ingredient absorption in Transparent Labs Creatine HMB.

Vitamin D3 | 12.5 mcg (500 IU)

Vitamin D, often referred to as the "sunshine vitamin," is an essential fat-soluble micronutrient that plays a particularly important role in maintaining healthy bones, nervous system function, and muscle mass. It is synthesized in the skin upon exposure to sunlight and is also found in a variety of foods.

Research has shown that vitamin D can enhance the muscle protein synthesis rate, particularly when combined with other anabolic factors like insulin and HMB [15]. This is thought to be through the sensitization of the Akt/mTOR signaling pathway, which is a key regulator of protein synthesis in muscle cells.

The combined effect of vitamin D with HMB and insulin leads to further activation of protein synthesis, suggesting a synergistic role of vitamin D in enhancing muscle anabolism/growth.

How to Use

Mixing Instructions

Add one level scoop (included in the container) of Creatine HMB powder into 10-12 ounces of cold water or your preferred beverage. For those who appreciate a bit more flavor or a different texture, feel free to adjust the amount of liquid to suit your taste preferences. Place the lid securely on your shaker cup and shake vigorously until the powder fully dissolves and the mix is smooth.

Optimal Consumption Times

Post-Workout Recovery: For best results, consume Transparent Labs Creatine HMB within 30 minutes after completing your workout.

Take Creatine HMB Daily: On days you don't exercise, take one scoop of Creatine HMB in the morning (with or without food) to aid in recovery and maintain muscle creatine stores. Consistency is key for maximizing the ergogenic effects of creatine supplementation.

Gradual Introduction (No Creatine Loading Necessary)

There is no need to "load" creatine as your muscle creatine stores will become saturated within a few weeks of consistent daily use of Creatine HMB (i.e. one scoop/serving per day). While you can safely consume 2-3 servings of Creatine HMB per day, we do not recommend using it for creatine loading as it will lead to excessive intake of vitamin D.

Third-Party Testing

We are proud to offer pure, potent, and quality products that consumers can count on, which is why we have every product batch third-party tested. Click the link below to view the most recent third-party testing data for Creatine HMB:

View Test Results (Button)

FAQs

What Does Transparent Labs Creatine HMB Do?

In a few words, Creatine HMB enhances strength, endurance, recovery, and muscle growth. Evidence suggests that combined creatine and HMB supplementation results in significantly greater lean body mass and strength gains compared to creatine or HMB supplementation alone. The synergistic combination of creatine monohydrate and HMB in our formula lets you push harder during workouts and achieve greater training adaptations (e.g. muscle growth and strength increases).

How Much HMB and Creatine Should I Take Daily?

For most adults, HMB should be taken in doses up to 3 grams per day, ideally split across one or two equal doses, while the typical daily maintenance dose of Creatine Monohydrate for active adults ranges between 3 to 5 grams.

Can I Take Creatine HMB if I Don't Exercise?

Taking Creatine HMB without exercising can still provide some benefits, such as supporting brain function and reducing muscle breakdown (both of which are important for longevity). However, to maximize the benefits of creatine supplementation, it's best to engage in regular exercise, particularly high-intensity training that induces marked muscle damage.

Should You Take Creatine HMB Before or After Working Out?

We recommend taking Creatine HMB "around" the time you work out (e.g. 30 minutes post-workout), but it's unlikely to make a significant difference whether you take it before or after exercising.

How Long Does it Take for Creatine HMB to Work?

Measurable increases in strength and muscle mass may be seen in 2-4 weeks of daily Creatine HMB use.

Should I Cycle Off Creatine Periodically?

Contrary to popular belief, cycling on and off creatine is neither necessary nor beneficial. Creatine monohydrate is most effective when used daily over the course of several weeks/months/years, as this keeps your muscle creatine stores saturated.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

No! While Transparent Labs Creatine HMB is manufactured in a facility that processes nuts (coconuts and peanuts), we have an allergen control program in place that sanitizes and cleans the manufacturing equipment between the use of allergenic and non-allergenic materials.

Is this Product Vegan?

Yes. Transparent Labs Creatine HMB is made with vegan-friendly ingredients.
