name: Cyanidin 3-Glucoside (C3G) Capsules
description_html:
Overview 

Cyanidin 3-glucoside (C3G) is a potent antioxidant belonging to a class of flavonoids known as anthocyanins. Like other anthocyanins, cyanidin-3-glucoside is an organic pigment that gives various fruits, vegetables, and plants distinctive red, purple, and blue tones. Transparent Labs C3G supplement contains 300 mg of purified cyanidin 3-glucoside per serving, whereas common food sources of C3G, notably berries, may only provide a few milligrams per 100-gram serving. As such, achieving therapeutic doses of cyanidin 3-glucoside via food alone can be challenging, if not impractical. Our C3G supplement makes it easier to reap the metabolic, cognitive, neurological, anti-inflammatory, and body composition benefits of this versatile anthocyanin.

Key Features

Purified and Highly Concentrated Cyanidin 3-Glucoside (C3G) Supplement: Transparent Labs C3G capsules are a single-active-ingredient formula that provides 300 mg C3G per serving, equal to the amount of C3G in nearly one pound of fresh blackberries (one of the most dense food sources of C3G). With 90 capsules (30 servings) per bottle, this C3G supplement is priced to be an exceptional, high-quality addition to your healthy lifestyle.

Versatile Antioxidant and Anti-Inflammatory Nutrient: Like other anthocyanins, cyanidin 3-glucoside has a strong antioxidant capacity, neutralizing free radicals (e.g. reactive oxygen species) that can harm cellular integrity and function. It also possesses anti-inflammatory properties by modulating pro-inflammatory cytokines, such as tumor necrosis factor-alpha.

Enhances Insulin Sensitivity/Glucose Uptake and Fat-Burning Gene Expression: Cyanidin 3-glucoside is gaining traction as a potential adjunct in the treatment of various metabolic disorders (e.g. type-2 diabetes and metabolic syndrome) due to its positive impact on insulin sensitivity and thermogenesis (i.e. calorie-burning). Thus, taking a C3G supplement may help combat fat gain and support healthy body composition.

Third-Party Tested for Purity, Potency, and Authenticity: Our commitment to full product transparency and quality assurance means each batch of Transparent Labs C3G capsules undergoes third-party testing to ensure each serving meets or exceeds the label claim of 300 mg cyanidin 3-glucoside.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Cyanidin 3-Glucoside | 300 mg

Cyanidin 3-glucoside (C3G) is a naturally occurring anthocyanin, which is a type of flavonoid pigment responsible for the red, purple, and blue hues in various fruits and vegetables. Chemically, C3G is classified as a glycoside, consisting of the anthocyanidin cyanidin coupled with a glucose (sugar) moiety. Its molecular structure engenders high solubility in water, allowing for efficient absorption in the upper digestive tract. Additionally, C3G has high bioavailability and can readily traverse cell membranes and biological barriers, including the blood-brain barrier, which underpins its versatile therapeutic potential throughout the body.

Among the most notable benefits of C3G is its antioxidant properties. By neutralizing free radicals, C3G can reduce oxidative stress and mitigate damage to cellular structures and biologically important molecules [2]. Uncontrolled oxidative stress is a well-known culprit for numerous disease states, including cardiovascular disease, type-2 diabetes, and cancer [3].

Aside from its antioxidant role, cyanidin 3-glucoside appears to have extensive and tissue-specific mechanisms of action. While we won't go into specific details herein, for the sake of brevity, it's important to note that C3G has been shown to modulate several key biochemical pathways and physiological processes that regulate weight/composition, insulin sensitivity/blood glucose levels, nitric oxide production, inflammatory response, neurological function, visual acuity, and more [4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9].

How to Use

Take 3 capsules daily, preferably before a meal earlier in the day. Do not exceed 3 capsules (300 mg of cyanidin 3-glucoside) per day unless otherwise directed by a qualified healthcare practitioner.

Optimal Consumption Times

While cyanidin 3-glucoside can be taken at any time, we recommend taking it with breakfast and again early in the afternoon to take advantage of its thermogenic benefits throughout the day.

FAQs

What Are the Benefits of Taking C3G Supplements?

Cyanidin 3-glucoside (C3G) confers antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits, which may reduce the risk of chronic diseases, improve heart health, and aid in weight management. It also holds potential as a neuroprotective, anti-cancer, anti-diabetic, and anti-thrombotic agent.

For example, tumor necrosis factor-alpha (α) is a pro-inflammatory cytokine involved in systemic inflammation and is implicated in various pathological conditions, including the progression of cancer cells and metabolic disorders. C3G has been shown to downregulate tumor necrosis factor-α expression, significantly mitigating inflammatory responses [10].

The comprehensive benefits make C3G a valuable supplement for overall health and longevity. 

How Does C3G Work?

C3G is absorbed into the bloodstream in its parent form, bolstering antioxidant capacity and reducing oxidative stress. It stimulates hepatic (liver) fatty acid oxidation, ketogenesis, and lipolysis in white adipose tissue while promoting mitochondrial oxidative metabolism and thermogenesis in brown adipose tissue. These mechanisms enhance cardiovascular, metabolic, and cognitive health.

Are There Any Side Effects of C3G Supplementation?

Cyanidin 3-glucoside is generally considered safe at recommended dosages, with no significant adverse effects reported. However, individual evaluation is advised, especially for those with underlying conditions or on medications. Consulting a healthcare professional before using a cyanidin 3-glucoside supplement is prudent. 

Can C3G Improve Cognitive Function and Brain Health?

Evidence suggests cyanidin 3-glucoside has neuroprotective properties that support cognitive function and brain health by mitigating neuronal damage and reducing neurodegenerative disease risk. Thus, it may improve memory, learning, and overall cognitive function.

How Does C3G Support Metabolic Health?

Cyanidin 3-glucoside supports metabolic health by enhancing mitochondrial oxidative metabolism and thermogenesis in brown adipose tissue, reducing body fat accumulation, and stimulating hepatic fatty acid oxidation, ketogenesis, and lipolysis in white adipose tissue. Studies in rodents have shown that both mice and isolated rat adipocytes treated with cyanidin 3-glucoside had significant changes in adipocyte-specific gene expression, suggesting particular anthocyanin enhances adipocytokine secretion [11, 12].

Cyanidin 3-glucoside also lowers blood glucose levels and improves insulin sensitivity by activating adenosine monophosphate-activated protein kinase (AMPk). These effects make it promising for preventing and managing metabolic syndrome.

Can C3G Aid in Muscle Recovery and Performance?

Cyanidin 3-glucoside aids muscle recovery and performance by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation following intense exercise. This promotes faster recovery, allowing for consistent training and enhanced endurance.

name: Cyclic Dextrin
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs StrengthSeries Cyclic Dextrin is a scientifically formulated carbohydrate supplement that enhances workout performance and muscle recovery by bolstering glycogen stores and providing extra energy when you need it most. Each serving delivers 25g of patented Cluster Dextrin®, a novel form of maltodextrin known as highly branched cyclic dextrin.

Unlike many carbohydrate powders and sports beverages, Cluster Dextrin® rapidly passes through the stomach and enters the small intestine, where it's slowly absorbed into the bloodstream. 

As such, Cluster Dextrin® is preferable for athletes and gym-goers since it won't cause sharp swings in blood sugar or lead to gastrointestinal (GI) distress/upset stomach.

Key Features

Patented Carbohydrate Powder: Each scoop delivers 25g of Cluster Dextrin®, a superior carbohydrate that supports quick gastric emptying and sustained energy without sharp blood sugar swings. 

Easily Digestible Endurance Fuel: Avoid the common pitfalls of carbohydrate dietary supplements made with insulin-spiking dextrose and maltodextrin that often cause GI distress and stomach issues.

Versatile Workout Supplement: Cluster Dextrin® can be used pre-workout, intra-workout, and/or post-workout depending on your nutrition needs. We recommend using it pre-workout to fuel intense training and post-workout—along with whey protein—to kickstart the muscle recovery process and replenish muscle glycogen stores.

Pure Single-Ingredient Formula: Our carbohydrate powder is unflavored, gluten-free, and free from artificial sweeteners, colors, and preservatives. Add it to your favorite pre-workout and/or post-workout supplement to foster an anabolic environment, enhance muscle-building, and perform your best.

Third-Party Tested: Like all Transparent Labs products, each batch of our carbohydrate powder is third-party tested for purity and potency.

Ingredient Profile

Cluster Dextrin® (Highly Branched Cyclic Dextrin) | 25g per serving

How to Use

Transparent Labs Cyclic Dextrin is a multi-functional dietary supplement that can be used pre-workout, intra-workout, and post-workout to fuel athletic performance and synergize with protein supplements (e.g. whey protein), amplifying muscle protein synthesis and increasing muscle mass. Here’s how to use this carbohydrate powder effectively:

Mixing Instructions

Combine 1-3 level scoops of Transparent Labs Carb Powder with 12-20 ounces of water or your preferred beverage. Cluster Dextrin® has a slightly sweet, neutral taste, so you can mix it with any powdered supplement without significantly altering the flavor profile.

Optimal Consumption Times

Pre-Workout: Consume one serving 30 minutes before training or an athletic event to fuel your muscles and promote sustained energy.

Intra-Workout: For prolonged physical activity, consume one serving during exercise to maintain muscle glycogen stores and energy levels.

Post-Workout: After exercise, mix 1-2 servings with your post-workout protein shake to replenish muscle glycogen and kickstart muscle recovery.

FAQs

Q. Why Use a Carbohydrate Powder Supplement?

Carbohydrate supplements are a practical way of fueling your body with an efficient energy source before, during, and after intense exercise. Our carbohydrate powder features clinically studied Cluster Dextrin®, which has desirable digestive and physiological characteristics. This unique carbohydrate allows athletes and gym-goers to improve their performance and muscle recovery without digestive discomfort associated with fast-acting carbohydrates like dextrose and maltodextrin.

Q. Does Carb Powder Help Build Muscle Mass?

Carbohydrate powders won't significantly stimulate muscle protein synthesis without concomitant ingestion of a protein source, such as whey protein. However, taking carbohydrate powder with protein can significantly bolster muscle protein synthesis and contribute to increased muscle growth.

Q. Does TL Cyclic Dextrin Contain Complex Carbohydrates or Fast-Acting Carbohydrates?

Cluster Dextrin® (highly branched cyclic dextrin) is technically a complex carbohydrate since it's comprised of many glucose polymers. However, its distinctive physicochemical properties make it a source of both rapid and long-lasting energy, leading to consistent blood sugar balance instead of "peaks" and "valleys."

Q. Are Carb Supplements Good for Bulking?

Absolutely. If your goal is muscle gain or effective refueling post-workout, carb supplements like carb powder are a great way to increase your carbohydrate and calorie intake conveniently and affordably.

Q. Should I Use a Carb Supplement for Muscle Recovery?

For anyone serious about their training and leading an active lifestyle, adding a natural whole foods-based carb supplement to your diet is highly beneficial. It supports long-lasting energy and enhances workout recovery.

Q. Should You Take Cyclic Dextrin Pre-Workout or Post-Workout?

Incorporate Cyclic Dextrin both 1 to 4 hours before your workout for fuel and within approximately 60 minutes after exercising for optimal muscle repair and recovery. Combining carbs with protein enhances both energy for your workout and muscle synthesis afterwards.

Q.When will my order be shipped out?

All orders ship out the following business day.

Q. Does Transparent Labs ship to my Country?

Transparent Labs ships Worldwide, except to the following countries, unfortunately, due to increasingly high fraudulent activity; Albania, Algeria, India, Lithuania, Macedonia, Romania, Russia, Tunisia, & Ukraine.

Q. Does this product contain nuts?

We process products in our facility that have nuts (coconuts, peanuts). However, we have an allergen control program in place that sanitizes and cleans our equipment between allergen and non-allergen runs!

name: Dopamine+
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Dopamine+ is a dietary supplement featuring natural ingredients that support dopamine levels. Dopamine, often referred to as the "feel-good" neurotransmitter, plays a critical role in our mood, motivation, and focus.

This stimulant-free formula contains clinically studied nutrients such as Sabroxy®, Cognizin®, and L-tyrosine to support the body's endogenous dopamine production and promote mental acuity, cognitive function, and focus without the associated mood swings and crashes that often come from using stimulant-based dopamine agonists.

Key Features

Naturally Supports Dopamine Neurotransmission: The ingredients in Transparent Labs Dopamine + naturally promote your body's dopamine production throughout the day. Dopamine is a vital neurotransmitter (chemical messenger) throughout the brain and body that regulates mood, drive, attention span, and much more.

Three-Pronged Mode of Action: The ingredients in this formula work by providing essential dopamine precursors, inhibiting dopamine reuptake, and modulating dopamine receptors. These converging mechanisms of action allow for comprehensive dopamine production and neurotransmission.

Non-Stimulant Formula: Transparent Labs Dopamine+ is a stimulant-free formula that can be taken in the morning, afternoon, or early evening without interrupting sleep.

30 Clinically Dosed Servings Per Bottle: Each bottle of Transparent Labs Dopamine+ contains 30 full doses to ensure efficacy and quality at an exceptional value.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

L-Tyrosine | 1,500 mg

L-tyrosine is a conditionally essential amino acid and precursor to dopamine and norepinephrine, two neurotransmitters that govern motivation and reward. Research shows that supplementing with L-tyrosine can significantly enhance cognitive performance, especially under acutely stressful situations (like cramming the night before an exam) [1].

L-Tyrosine has also been shown to improve “cognitive flexibility,” meaning it can help you adapt to changing cognitive demands and block extraneous thoughts [2].Another study found that L-tyrosine improves "deep/critical thinking" rather than brainstorming (divergent thinking) [3].

Sabroxy® (Oroxylum indicum) Extract (bark) (10% Oroxylin A) | 500 mg

Sabroxy® is a patented herbal extract of Oroxylum indicium that has been shown to possess neuroprotective and cognition-enhancing properties [4]. This specific extract is standardized to contain a minimum 10% oroxylin A, a flavonoid that can inhibit dopamine reuptake, thereby increasing synaptic dopamine levels between nerve cells (neurons) [5]. This mechanism of action supports focus, attention, and cognitive function.

Cognizin® Citicoline (CDP-Choline) | 250 mg

Cognizin® is a patented form of cytidine diphosphate (CDP)-choline, also known as citicoline, that plays a dual role in supporting cognitive function. First, it provides bioavailable choline to support acetylcholine synthesis, a neurotransmitter involved in memory and learning [6]. Second, citicoline supports the production of phosphatidylcholine, a key phospholipid of brain cell membranes, enhancing neuronal communication and dopamine receptor function [7].

Saffron (7.5% Crocins, 1% Safranals) | 30 mg

Saffron, the dried stigma of Crocus sativus, has been traditionally used for its mood-enhancing properties. Crocins and safranals, the active constituents of saffron, have been shown to increase dopamine levels and improve mood [8]. These compounds can help alleviate symptoms of depression and anxiety, further supporting a focused and positive mental state [9].

Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxal-5-Phosphate) | 0.44 mg

Vitamin B6 is a vital cofactor in the synthesis of neurotransmitters, including dopamine. It facilitates the conversion of L-DOPA to dopamine by acting as a coenzyme, thereby enhancing mood and cognitive function [10].

Folate (Vitamin B9) | 400 mcg DFE

Folate is another essential B vitamin for neurotransmitter production. Specifically, it participates in methylation reactions essential for synthesizing dopamine [11]. Folate's role in maintaining homocysteine levels also supports brain health, further contributing to improved focus and mental clarity [12].

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, take 4 capsules on an empty stomach, preferably in the morning or afternoon.

Optimal Consumption Times

Transparent Labs Dopamine+ is a stimulant-free formula that can be taken in the morning, afternoon, or early evening without interrupting sleep. However, it is generally advisable to avoid taking this product within 3-4 hours of bedtime as heightened dopamine activity can make it harder to fall asleep.

FAQs

Will This Product Help with Dopamine Deficiency?

Dopamine deficiency is known to cause numerous physical and mental health conditions (e.g. Parkinson's disease). While the ingredients in Transparent Labs Dopamine+ can help increase dopamine levels, this product is not intended to treat any medical conditions.

Can Dopamine Supplements Interact with Other Medications?

Yes. If you currently take dopamine agonist medications or other medications, you should consult with your healthcare provider before taking dopamine supplements, as they may heighten the effects of the medications you're using. Transparent Labs Dopamine+ is not intended as a substitute for any prescription medications.

Can I Take Dopamine Supplements with Other Dietary Supplements?

Yes, Transparent Labs Dopamine+ can be taken with most dietary supplements without harm. However, the answer to this question depends on the specific ingredients in the other dietary supplements you're using.

Do Dopamine Pills Require a Prescription?

Transparent Labs Dopamine+ does not contain any substances that are considered drugs and, therefore, does not require a prescription. However, you should consult a healthcare professional before taking any dopamine-related supplements if you're currently taking any prescription medications, especially dopamine agonists.

Do Dopamine Supplements Affect Blood Pressure?

Dopamine can act on different types of receptors in the body depending on its levels. At lower concentrations, dopamine primarily stimulates dopamine receptors (D1 and D2). Activation of D1 receptors in the kidneys and vasculature leads to vasodilation, which can lower blood pressure. D2 receptor activation inhibits norepinephrine release, also contributing to vasodilation.

At higher concentrations, dopamine stimulates beta-1 adrenergic receptors in the heart, increasing cardiac output and vasoconstriction. This can lead to increased blood pressure (which may be useful for individuals with very low blood pressure).

As always, if you have any medical condition, it's best to consult with a qualified healthcare professional before using any dietary supplements.

name: Grass-Fed Collagen
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen Hydrolysate contains 22 grams of hydrolyzed bovine (hide) collagen peptides per serving, derived exclusively from grass-fed cows. Collagen is the most abundant protein in the human body and is essential for skin health, joint support, strong bones, youthful hair and nails, and much more.

As we age, our endogenous collagen production begins to decline, contributing to signs of aging, joint pain, bone loss, gastrointestinal deterioration, and impaired muscle function. Supplementing with collagen peptides helps "make up" for the body's lower production levels and improves numerous aspects of our wellbeing and appearance.

Key Features

Grass-Fed, Pasture-Raised Bovine Collagen Supplement: Grass-fed cows are known to produce byproducts (e.g. milk and collagen) with superior nutritional profiles compared to conventionally raised cattle. The natural grazing diet of grass-fed cows leads to a higher concentration of beneficial nutrients in their collagen, including essential amino acids and bioactive peptides that are vital for the maintenance and repair of body tissues. 

Support Healthy Hair, Skin Hydration, Joint Integrity, and More: The efficacy of hydrolyzed bovine collagen is supported by numerous studies. For instance, research has demonstrated compelling benefits of daily collagen supplementation for joint health, skin hydration/elasticity, hair quality, muscle recovery, bone turnover, and overall anti-aging.

Add to Hot or Cold Liquids: Our collagen powder supplement is easily digested and makes a great addition to your morning coffee or tea for a health and flavor boost. If you prefer cold drinks, simply add it to chilled water, milk, juice, or smoothies to support your wellness goals!

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Delicious Flavor (Also Available Unflavored): Choose from our delicious chocolate flavor and unflavored options; if you prefer a more neutral-tasting powder that can be added to virtually any drink, we recommend the unflavored option.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Hydrolyzed Bovine Collagen (Grass-Fed) | 22g

As a group of vital proteins, collagen peptides are complete protein sources with a characteristic amino acid profile rich in L-glycine, L-proline, and L-hydroxyproline. Using a collagen supplement supports the amount of collagen peptides in the body, promoting the health and integrity of numerous body tissues, especially connective tissues like bones, hair, skin, and joints [1].

Supplementing with collagen peptides is becoming a popular "anti-aging" strategy for health-conscious consumers since the body's endogenous collagen production starts to decline around the age of 30 [2]. As such, regularly taking collagen peptides may:

Reduce signs of aging (e.g. skin wrinkles and brittle hair) [3]
Enhance muscle recovery [4]
Alleviate joint pain [5]
Promote skin hydration and elasticity [6]

Hydrolyzed bovine collagen, particularly from grass-fed sources, is a type of collagen protein that has undergone enzymatic hydrolysis to break down its large, complex proteins into smaller peptides. This process makes the collagen more digestible and easier for the body to absorb.

Bovine collagen is rich in types I and III collagen, which are critical for skin, bone, and tendon health. These types provide essential structural support and promote the repair and regeneration of worn-out tissues. Grass-fed bovine collagen is also a sustainable choice, aligning with environmentally friendly practices by utilizing the entire animal and reducing waste. 

How To Use

Mixing Instructions

Combine one (1) level scoop of Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Collagen Powder with 6-10 ounces of hot or cold liquid and mix in a shaker cup or with a spoon until powder is fully dissolved.

You may take an additional one to two scoops throughout the day but do not rely on collagen peptides as a sole source of dietary protein.

Optimal Consumption Times

Collagen peptides are a staple in many people's daily routine and don't necessarily have an "optimal" consumption time. We recommend taking collagen daily at a time that's convenient, whether it's with your morning coffee, after working out, or before bedtime.

FAQs

Is Collagen Protein Powder Good for You? 

A growing body of scientific evidence supports the use of collagen protein powder, indicating various health benefits, particularly for the structural integrity of connective tissues. However, while collagen supplements are generally well-tolerated, their efficacy might vary based on the type and source of collagen used—this is why Transparent Labs collagen peptides are derived from grass-fed, pasture-raised cows. 

Is it OK to Take Collagen Powder Every Day?

Daily consumption of collagen peptides is widely considered safe for most individuals. Regular intake can support ongoing bodily repair and maintenance functions, which are crucial for skin, joints, and muscle tissue.

Are There Side Effects to Collagen Protein?

Collagen supplements are very well-tolerated; there are occasional reports of minor gastrointestinal disturbances, including nausea, bloating, and heartburn. The side effects may vary depending on the individual's sensitivity and the specific formulation of the supplement.

Is Collagen Protein Powder Good for Weight Loss?

Although some proponents claim that collagen protein powder may aid weight loss by promoting satiety and preserving muscle mass, current scientific evidence remains insufficient to support these claims.

Can I Mix Transparent Labs Collagen Protein Powder with Milk?

Yes, our grass-fed, pasture-raised collagen peptides are miscible in hot or cold liquids, such as milk, coffee, fruit juice, or water.

Can I Mix Creatine with Collagen Protein Powder?

Yes. In fact, it’s highly recommended that creatine be consumed shortly after a workout, which is also a good time to take collagen peptides.

Do Collagen Peptides Lose Potency If I Pre-Mix Them Ahead of Time?

Pre-mixed collagen peptides do not necessarily lose their potency, but improper storage can lead to spoilage. To ensure maximum efficacy, prepare only a day's worth of the collagen protein mixture at a time. Store the pre-mixed solution in a covered container in the refrigerator and consume it within 48 hours to maintain potency. 

Is Collagen Hydrolysate Protein Powder Considered a Meal Replacement?

Supplemental collagen peptides are not intended as a meal replacement or weight gainer. For optimal benefits, we recommend taking a collagen supplement alongside a nutritionally balanced diet with various protein sources.

Why Use Colostrum Powder?

Support immune resilience, gut integrity, and muscle recovery with a clinically effective 20g dose of bioactive-rich, grass-fed bovine colostrum.

Optimize Immune Function
Help balance immune responses during intense exercise, and reduce training-related inflammation.

Support Gut Health
Strengthen the gut barrier and reduce intestinal permeability (leaky gut) especially in high-stress training environments.

Enhance Muscle Recovery
Packed with growth factors that promote muscle protein synthesis, improve body composition, and support recovery from strenuous workouts.

Clinically Dosed for Performance
At 20 grams per serving, this is one of the highest-potency colostrum supplements available—dose.

How to Use: 

Step 1 – Mix Powder & Liquid 
Combine one (1) level scoop of Transparent Labs Grass-Fed Colostrum Powder with 6-10 ounces of cold liquid. 

Step 2 – Shake Vigorously
Mix, shake, or stir until powder is fully dissolved. 

Step 3 – Enjoy Daily 
We recommend taking colostrum daily at a convenient time, whether it's with breakfast, after working out, or before bedtime.

*Do not mix with hot or boiling liquids in order to preserve the biopotency and active compounds in the colostrum powder.

FAQ: 

How is Transparent Labs Colostrum different from other colostrum supplements?

Most colostrum products are underdosed and positioned for general wellness. Ours delivers 20g per serving—the clinically validated dose—sourced from grass-fed cows and processed to preserve its full spectrum of bioactive compounds for performance-driven results.

Is it safe to take colostrum supplements daily?

For most healthy individuals, daily consumption of bovine colostrum is considered safe. However, those with dairy allergies or lactose intolerance should exercise caution. It's advisable to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen.

Can colostrum supplements be combined with other protein powders or powdered supplements like collagen?

Yes, colostrum can be mixed with other protein supplements or collagen. Combining them may offer complementary benefits, supporting both immune function and joint or skin health. Ensure that the combination fits within your dietary needs and consult with a healthcare provider if unsure.

When is the best time to take colostrum?

For optimal absorption and gut-related benefits, colostrum is best taken on an empty stomach—either first thing in the morning or between meals. Avoid mixing with hot liquids, which can degrade bioactive compounds.

name: Grass-Fed Protein+ Bars
description_html:
Overview 

If you're tired of protein bars loaded with artificial ingredients, sugar alcohols, and harsh fiber sources, Transparent Labs Protein+ Bars are a clean, guilt-free way to get more protein in your diet no matter where life takes you. The Protein+ Bar provides complete nutrition from real-food ingredients, making it a perfect meal or snack whenever you're in a pinch, traveling, or want to indulge in a macro-friendly treat after hitting the gym.

Protein+ Bars pack 15-16 grams of protein from grass-fed whey and egg whites, 20-23 grams of whole-food carbohydrates, and 15-17 grams of healthy fats in three mouthwatering flavors to keep your muscles and taste buds satisfied. (*Macros vary slightly between flavor options.)

Key Features

Complete Nutrition On-The-Go: Protein bars have traditionally not been a great way to get more protein throughout the day due to all the added and often deceptive junk in the formulas. We've taken a different approach with Protein+ Bars by creating a macro-friendly, tasty, real-food-based protein bar that provides a balanced profile of quality protein, essential fats, and wholesome carbohydrates.

Features Grass-Fed Whey and Egg White Protein: Protein+ Bars don't cut corners with cheap protein sources like most protein bars. Each Protein+ Bar packs 15 grams of complete protein from grass-fed whey isolate and egg whites, arguably two of the best protein sources for muscle recovery.

No Gut-Wrenching Fibers, Artificial Sweeteners, or Sugar Alcohols: Unlike the majority of protein bars on the market, the Protein+ Bar is made with easily digestible, whole-food-based, non-GMO ingredients. This protein bar is also free from sugar alcohols, artificial sweeteners, and cheap fiber sources that leave your gut in knots.

Three Decadent Flavors to Satisfy Your Taste Buds: Protein+ Bars, made exclusively with natural ingredients, complete protein, and low added sugar content, so you can indulge without compromising your health and fitness goals. Choose from delicious chocolate peanut butter, dark chocolate almond, and oatmeal chocolate chip flavors

12 Bars Per Box: Each box of Protein+ Bars comes with 12 bars to help you reach protein intake goals and stay on track no matter how busy life gets.

Ingredients and Benefits

Ingredients May Vary Depending on Flavour***

Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate

Grass-fed whey protein isolate is a complete protein source that's rapidly absorbed and easily digestible. Being derived from the milk of grass-fed cows, our whey protein isolate is an excellent source of essential amino acids and branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs), which are crucial for muscle repair and growth [1].

Egg White Protein

Egg white protein is another exceptional complete protein source that promotes muscle repair; in fact, egg whites have the highest attainable protein-digestibility corrected amino acid score (PDCAAS) [2]. They are also a good source of B vitamins and selenium.

Natural Peanut Butter

Natural peanut butter contains a generous amount of protein, healthy fats, and fiber, which promote satiety and heart health. It is also rich in vitamins E and B3, as well as minerals like magnesium, supporting overall micronutrient intake without the added sugar or hydrogenated trans-fat found in more processed versions.

Natural Almond Butter

Almonds are a nutrient-dense nut packed with heart-healthy monounsaturated fats, protein, and dietary fiber, making them a perfect complement to our protein bars. Almonds are also nutritious due to their magnesium and antioxidant content, which are commonly lacking in the diet.

Dairy-Free Chocolate Chips

Made with unsweetened chocolate, cocoa butter, and a small amount of cane sugar, these dairy-free chocolate chips provide the rich sweetness and flavor of traditional chocolate chips without using any milk products and have low sugar content.

Dates

Dates come packed with fiber, potassium, and essential trace minerals like copper and manganese. They also provide a wholesome, natural sweetness to our Protein+ Bars.

Gluten-Free Rolled Oats

Gluten-free rolled oats are a heart-healthy carbohydrate source that provides soluble fiber and sustained energy. They also contain an array of antioxidant micronutrients and essential minerals to promote overall wellness.

Coconut Oil

Coconut oil is a dense source of medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs), a class of "healthy" saturated fats that support metabolism and energy production [3]. It also imparts the Protein+ Bar with a softer texture.

Honey

Honey is a natural sweetener with a diverse nutritional profile, including trace amounts of vitamins, minerals, enzymes, amino acids, and antioxidants. Unlike refined sugars, honey contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that contribute to its antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory effects. Its lower glycemic index than table sugar means it has a more stable impact on blood sugar levels.

Tapioca Syrup

Tapioca syrup, derived from the starch of the cassava root, is a natural sweetener that offers a gluten-free alternative to corn syrup. The body rapidly absorbs tapioca syrup, providing a quick energy boost to keep you moving.

Sea Salt

Sea salt is less processed than regular table salt and more flavorful, so its inclusion in the Protein+ Bar was a no-brainer. Sea salt is a natural source of numerous electrolyte minerals, notably magnesium, sodium, and potassium, adding not only a dash of flavor but also essential micronutrients to the final product.

How To Use

Open the wrapper, remove the bar, take a bite, and try not to eat it all at once! After removal from the wrapper, Protein+ Bars can be placed on a plate or napkin and microwaved for 15-20 seconds for a softer, melt-in-your-mouth treat.

Optimal Consumption Times

Protein+ Bars can be eaten any time you want a healthy meal or snack, but we typically recommend eating them after a workout or when you don't have time to eat a whole-food meal.

FAQs

Are Protein Bars Healthy, and How Many Should I Eat Per Day?

Protein bars are not intrinsically healthy nor unhealthy since it depends on what they contain and how they fit into the overall scope of your dietary needs (the same applies to how many you should eat per day). We would contend that Protein+ Bars are "healthy" because of the balanced macronutrient profile and our ingredient selection, but that doesn't mean you should eat several of them per day (especially if it doesn't align with your macronutrient intake goals).

When Is the Best Time to Eat a Protein Bar, and Can it Replace a Meal?

Protein+ Bars can be eaten any time you want a healthy meal replacement or snack, though you might need to eat more than one bar if you're using it as a large meal replacement. We typically recommend Protein+ Bars after a workout, when you don't have time to eat a whole-food meal, or when you want a high-protein snack throughout the day.

What Should I Look For in a Protein Bar?

This depends on your goals and dietary needs/restrictions; however, we think it's important to look for a protein bar that is made with wholesome, natural ingredients and to be cautious when you see protein bars labeled as "sugar-free" or "low net carbs" as they very likely contains exorbitant amounts of fiber and/or sugar alcohols.

Is it Healthier to Have Protein Bars or Protein Shakes?

Either of these can be healthy options depending on your macronutrient intake goals and dietary preferences/restrictions. Some may argue that pure protein shakes are "healthier" because they contain mostly protein and fewer ingredients, but protein bars can be a healthy choice too, particularly when you need more than just protein (i.e. a snack or meal replacement).

Are Protein+ Bars Considered Vegan Protein Bars?

Unfortunately, no. The Protein+ Bar is not a vegan protein bar since it contains egg white and whey protein, which are derived from animals. However, we do carry vegan protein powder made with rice and pea protein.

Does Transparent Labs Ship to My Country?

Transparent Labs ships Worldwide, with the following exceptions due to increasingly high fraudulent activity in these countries: Albania, Algeria, India, Israel, Lithuania, Macedonia, Mexico, Romania, Russia, Tunisia, and Ukraine.

When will My Order be Shipped Out?

All orders ship out the following business day.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

Yes, this product directly contains nuts (peanuts and coconut). If you are allergic to these, we recommend checking out our whey protein powder instead.

Is this Product Gluten-Free?

While many of the ingredients in Protein+ bars are gluten-free, the product as a whole is not tested for traces of gluten. Therefore, we cannot guarantee that Protein+ Bars are gluten-free. 

What's in the Dairy-Free Chocolate Chips?

Our chocolate chips are made with unsweetened chocolate, cane sugar, and cocoa butter.

name: Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has become a pantry staple among health-conscious consumers who want a quality source of protein for supporting muscle growth, recovery, and overall health. Unlike many protein powders on the market, TL whey protein isolate is sourced from grass-fed cattle, raised humanely and without the use of growth hormones or hormonal agents, and contains absolutely no artificial sweeteners, food dyes, or fillers.

Choose from 14 (and counting) delicious flavor options, or select the unflavored option if you prefer a pure whey protein isolate powder with a neutral taste. Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate is easy to mix with liquids and can be incorporated into various recipes, making it a convenient and versatile protein source that fits easily into any diet.

Key Features:

28 grams of protein per serving, boasting an industry-leading protein-by-weight percentage of 87.5% (may vary slightly by flavor).

Sourced exclusively from grass-fed American dairy cattle, raised without the use of growth hormone, growth factors, and/or anabolic steroids.

Made with natural ingredients and no artificial sweeteners, fillers, food dyes, gluten, or preservatives.

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Virtually lactose-free and only 1 gram of fat per serving, perfect for adding an easily digestible, quality source of protein to your diet.

Trusted by the best to be the best, with an overall rating of 98 out of 100 by Labdoor and backed by athletes like Paul Sklar & Hafthor Björnsson, Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has set a standard as the cleanest whey protein powder available.

Available in 14 delicious flavors that cater to every palate while supporting lean muscle growth and overall protein intake.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate

The quality of your protein matters, and whey protein isolate is one of the purest forms of protein available. It provides a high protein content with minimal fats and carbohydrates, making it an exceptional choice for building muscle and accelerating recovery between workouts. In contrast to whey protein concentrate, whey protein isolate undergoes further filtration to remove virtually all of the lactose, making it more suitable for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Whey protein isolate is known for its rapid absorption and ideal ratio of all nine essential amino acids (EAAs)—which includes the branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs)—necessary for stimulating muscle protein synthesis [1, 2]. In other words, whey protein isolate is about as good as it gets for kickstarting the muscle-building process after working out. By providing essential nutrients needed for muscle repair, whey protein isolate can reduce recovery time, allowing for more consistent and intense training sessions.

So, why does the "grass-fed" distinction matter for whey protein powder? The vast majority of whey protein powders are made from the milk of grain-fed cows, whereas grass-fed whey protein is derived from the milk of cows that graze on natural, pesticide-free grass pastures instead of feeding on grains. Grass-feeding positively impacts the nutritional composition and quality of a cow's milk (which is subsequently used to make cheese, and "whey" is a byproduct of cheesemaking) [3].

Research has found that grass-fed whey protein boasts higher levels of bioactive whey peptides (e.g. immunoglobulins and lactoferrin), omega-3 essential fatty acids, conjugated linoleic acid (CLA), and vitamins E and A—nutrients essential for inflammation control, muscle recovery, and overall health [4]. Just as important, grass-fed whey protein isolate is free from added hormones and antibiotics that may persist in conventional dairy products [5].

How to Use

Maximize your results with Transparent Labs Whey Protein Isolate by following these guidelines:

Mixing Instructions

Combine one scoop (~32 g) of Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate with 6-8 ounces of water, milk, or your preferred beverage in a shaker cup (with a wire whisk ball) for a smooth, delicious protein shake. Seal the shaker cup and shake vigorously for a few seconds until the powder is fully dissolved, then enjoy!

Optimal Consumption Times

Post-Workout Recovery: Whey protein isolate is quickly absorbed by the body, making it ideal for post-workout recovery as it helps to repair and build muscle tissue efficiently.

Anytime Protein Boost: Our grass-fed whey protein isolate can also be used in recipes (e.g., pancakes) and incorporated into foods like yogurt and oatmeal to easily increase daily protein intake.

FAQs

How Does Whey Protein Isolate Differ from Whey Protein Concentrate?

Whey Protein Isolate undergoes additional processing to remove most of the lactose and fat content, leaving >90% protein. Whey protein isolate is often preferred over whey protein concentrate due to its higher protein purity and reduced allergen content.

Is Whey Protein Good for Weight Loss or just Muscle Building?

Protein is known for its satiating and thermodynamic effects, which can help reduce hunger and increase calorie expenditure. Incorporating whey protein isolate into your diet can assist in weight management by promoting fullness and an energy deficit.

What’s in your “Natural Flavors”?

The natural flavors used in our products are derived from natural sources such as plants, fruits, or spices to enhance the taste of our products. For example, the organic compound isobutyl acetate is found in raspberries, pears, and pineapples and is used commercially to impart natural fruity flavors.

Food labeling practices require the term "natural flavor" to be used instead of the specific constituents that comprise the flavoring. We prioritize using natural flavors to provide a clean and enjoyable taste experience for our customers. If you're looking for a whey protein isolate with no natural flavors, try our Unflavored option!

Is it suitable for individuals with dietary restrictions or allergies?

Some flavors do contain nuts (please refer to the label for allergen warnings). We test for gluten and the main 8 FALCPA allergens in all of our products. We have an allergen segregation program and sanitize our lines after each allergen-containing production run.

We are also NSF-certified on the facility level - this means that our allergen control and segregation program is approved at the highest standard possible. Note that our peanut-based flavors contain actual peanuts, so those with peanut allergies should strictly avoid these flavors.

Whey isolate undergoes further processing to remove most of the lactose, making it a suitable option for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Who Should Not Take Whey Protein Powder?

Individuals with a milk allergy or severe lactose intolerance should not consume whey protein powders.

Is it Safe to Take Whey Protein Powder Every Day?

Yes, consuming whey protein powder daily is safe for most individuals. However, it's important not to rely on it as your sole source of protein.

Is the product tested by any third-party organizations for quality and safety?

TL Protein is certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein for quality assurance, composition, and banned substances. We also test all of our protein with 3rd-party labs for contaminants and ingredient composition. You can find all of our latest 3rd party testing data on this page.

Does Transparent Labs Ship to My Country?

Transparent Labs offers worldwide shipping, with a few exceptions due to import restrictions in the EU/UK, and high fraudulent activity in specific countries. Please check our shipping policy for more details.

When Will My Order Be Shipped Out?

All orders are dispatched the following business day.

Q. When Will My Order Be Shipped Out?

name: Growth
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Growth is a versatile anabolic catalyst featuring a clinically effective dose (1,500 mg) of Mediator® phosphatidic acid in every serving. This formula amplifies muscle protein synthesis and bolsters athletic performance through dynamic intra- and inter-cellular signaling pathways that govern muscular adaptations. Since Mediator® phosphatidic acid is a stimulant-free ingredient, you can stack Growth with your favorite pre-workout and post-workout supplements for additional performance and body composition benefits.

Key Features

  • Clinically Dosed Phosphatidic Acid Supplement: Each serving of Transparent Labs Growth provides a clinically studied dose of patented Mediator® Phosphatidic Acid, a naturally occurring glycerophospholipid that plays an important role in muscle protein synthesis (and, by extension, muscle growth).

  • Supports Lean Body Mass & Skeletal Muscle Hypertrophy: Several studies have found that phosphatidic acid supplementation significantly increases resistance-exercise-induced hypertrophy and lean muscle mass in active individuals.

  • Amplifies Muscle Strength Gains: Supplemental phosphatidic acid is suggested to promote muscle protein synthesis through a distinct pathway that ultimately converges with mechanical stimuli, creating a more pronounced muscle hypertrophy response after lifting weights.

  • Pure, Quality Ingredients (No Fillers or Nonsense): Consistent with our core values, each batch of Transparent Labs Growth is third-party tested for purity, potency, and authenticity. This unflavored powder contains absolutely no additives and mixes easily in water.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Mediator® Phosphatidic Acid | 1,500 mg

Phosphatidic acid is a naturally occurring molecule, specifically a glycerophospholipid, found in cell membranes. It acts as a lipid mediator by transmitting signals within cells that are essential for various biological processes, including muscle protein synthesis. Mediator® Phosphatidic Acid is a patented and clinically studied form of phosphatidic acid that has been shown to increase max strength, muscle mass, and fat loss in healthy adults who engage in resistance training [1].

The ergogenic benefits of phosphatidic acid supplementation appear to be independent of protein intake, suggesting that it is an integral mediator of the mechanistic/mammalian target of rapamycin (mTOR) protein complexes that control skeletal muscle protein synthesis [2, 3]. As such, phosphatidic acid ingestion may confer an additive anabolic effect with other muscle-building supplements and adequate protein intake.

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, mix one scoop (1.5 grams) of Transparent Labs Growth in 4-6 oz of water and consume once daily, preferably on an empty stomach or between meals. This powder may also be taken as a "dry scoop" and washed down with water.

Optimal Timing

We recommend taking your daily serving of Transparent Labs Growth on an empty stomach 30-45 minutes before exercising. If you use a whey protein powder after working out, this protocol will allow enough time for resensitizing muscle protein synthesis before taking your post-workout whey protein shake.

FAQs

How Many Servings Are in Each Container of Growth?

There are 30 servings per container of Growth.

Can I Take Growth with Other Supplements? 

Yes, absolutely. Phosphatidic acid can generally be taken in conjunction with other supplements, such as protein powders and creatine, without adverse interactions.

How Should I Take Growth?

Please refer to the "How to Use" section above for instructions on how to take Growth.

Are There Any Side Effects of Using Phosphatidic Acid?

Phosphatidic acid (PA) supplementation has been extensively studied and found to be safe for both men and women. When used at recommended dosages (typically up to 750 mg daily), it may occasionally cause minimal gastrointestinal side effects.

However, as with any supplement, it is advisable you consult a healthcare professional before beginning use, particularly if underlying health conditions exist or take prescription medications. 

Is Phosphatidic Acid Supplementation Safe to Take for Athletes? 

Phosphatidic Acid supplementation is generally considered safe for athletes when taken at recommended doses. Studies have shown it to be non-toxic and well-tolerated (e.g., a daily intake of 750 mg over 8 weeks in healthy college-aged individuals). 

How Long Will It Take to See Results with Phosphatidic Acid? 

The time it takes to see notable results with phosphatidic acid supplementation can vary, but significant improvements in muscle growth and strength have been documented within an 8-week period in resistance-trained individuals. Consistency in supplementation (i.e. daily use) and a diligent resistance-training regimen are essential for maximizing the benefits of phosphatidic acid.

name: Hydrate
description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs Hydrate is a sugar-free electrolyte powder featuring bioavailable minerals, taurine, SenActiv®, and coconut water powder to help you stay hydrated throughout the day and during training. Unlike conventional “sports drinks” and many electrolyte powders, Transparent Labs Hydrate contains no added sugars, artificial coloring, or artificial sweeteners.

Instead, this electrolyte supplement is made with natural flavoring and sweetened with stevia to deliver a refreshing, sugar-free hydration boost to your daily water intake.

Key Features:

  • Pure Electrolytes for Optimal Hydration: Formulated with a bioavailable electrolyte mixture to promote optimal hydration, including TRAACS® calcium bisglycinate, Aquamin™ magnesium, sodium from Himalayan rock salt, taurine, and natural potassium from organic coconut water powder.

  • Enhanced with Senactiv™: Patented adaptogen complex that supports exercise performance and muscle recovery at the subcellular level.

  • Gluten-Free, Non-GMO, and Naturally Sweetened with Stevia: Sweetened naturally with stevia leaf extract; no added sugar or hidden carbohydrates like other electrolyte supplements.

  • Powdered Drink Mix in Six Refreshing Flavors: Choose from Raspberry Lemonade, Peach Mango, Blue Raspberry, Arctic Freeze, Tropical Punch, and Lemon Lime.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Senactiv™ | 50 mg: SenActiv® is a patented, clinically studied ergogenic adaptogen complex that provides highly purified and fractionated extracts of Panax notoginseng and Rosa roxburghii (rose hips). The unique phytochemicals in SenActiv® have been shown to enhance subcellular processes that accelerate muscle recovery after exhaustive exercise [1]. These compounds also possess adaptogenic properties to facilitate athletic performance and healthy aging [2].

Taurine | 1,000 mg: Taurine is a naturally occurring sulfonic acid not abundant in the diet. Supplementing with taurine provides cell-hydrating properties and neuroprotective effects throughout the nervous system [3]. In addition, a recent meta-analysis concluded that taurine can significantly enhance stamina, strength, and power capacity during exercise, and it appears to have a range of cognitive benefits as well [4].

Calcium (as TRAACS® Calcium Bisglycinate and Di-Calcium Phosphate) | 84 mg: Calcium is an essential mineral for enhancing the integrity of bone and promoting the growth, proliferation, and differentiation of bone cells [5]. It’s also a crucial micronutrient in muscles as it associates with mitochondria in muscle cells to stimulate ATP synthesis [6]. To ensure optimal efficacy and absorption, TL Hydrate features TRAACS chelated calcium and dicalcium phosphate, two highly bioavailable forms of supplemental calcium [7].

Magnesium (as Aquamin™ Mg) | 50 mg: Extracted from red algae, Aquamin™ is a natural source of magnesium and 72 other trace minerals. Magnesium is a vital electrolyte mineral that has ubiquitous roles in the body, one of which is regulating muscle contraction [8]. Aquamin® Magnesium provides magnesium in its native ionic state for optimal biocompatibility. Magnesium deficiency is well-known to cause issues with the intestines and often contributes to constipation and dehydration [9]. As such, consuming adequate amounts of bioavailable magnesium is imperative for active individuals.

Sodium (as Sodium Citrate and from Himalayan Rock Salt) | 500 mg: Sodium is the primary positive ion (cation) in the fluid outside of cells. It modulates the amount of water in the body and the movement of sodium into and out of cells is essential for proper cell-to-cell signaling.

Potassium (as Potassium Citrate, Potassium Chloride, and from Organic Coconut Water) | 250 mg: As a counterpart to sodium, potassium is the primary cationic (positively charged) electrolyte inside cells. The balance of sodium and potassium is particularly important for cellular hydration, and potassium is necessary for intra- and inter-cellular signaling, as well as being a substrate for skeletal muscle contraction.

Organic Coconut Water Powder | 500 mg: Coconut water powder removes the sugary and fatty constituents of coconut water while retaining the essential electrolyte micronutrients, such as magnesium, potassium, phosphorus, and sodium. Due to its abundant electrolyte profile, coconut water can rapidly rehydrate athletes after intense exercise, making it ideal for pre-, intra-, and post-workout supplementation [11].

How to Use

Designed for before, during, and after your workout sessions, Transparent Labs Hydrate rapidly replenishes electrolytes and supports muscle contractility, endurance, recovery, and cell volumization. Get the most out of this electrolyte powder by following these guidelines:

Mixing Instructions

Mix one scoop of Transparent Labs Hydrate with 6-8 ounces of water. For a consistent mix, use a shaker cup or water bottle and shake until the powder is fully dissolved. If using more than one scoop at a time, adjust the amount of water accordingly; less water will result in a stronger flavor, and vice versa.

Optimal Consumption Times

Pre-Workout: Drinking our hydration powder before your workout helps prepare your body for physical activity, ensuring you're well-hydrated from the get-go.

Intra-Workout: Sipping electrolytes during your workout is especially useful if you start feeling dehydrated and/or you're a heavy sweater.

Post-Workout: Taking a serving of Transparent Labs Hydrate after your workout is also great for recovery and rehydration, helping to replenish lost fluids and electrolytes.

FAQs

Is it OK to Drink Electrolytes Every Day?

While electrolytes are essential for bodily functions, they should be consumed in moderation. Daily intake is recommended for active individuals, but it's important to avoid excessive consumption.

How Often Should You Drink Electrolytes?

Adults and children over 4 years can safely consume electrolytes daily to support hydration and electrolyte balance, particularly when active or in hot climates.

Is Electrolyte Powder Good For You?

Electrolyte powders can support hydration and electrolyte balance, which is especially beneficial for athletes. However, it's important to choose powders without excessive sugars or artificial additives.

Are Hydration Powders Worth Taking?

Yes, electrolyte powders can be beneficial, especially for athletes or anyone engaged in physical activity, as they help maintain electrolyte balance and hydration levels, crucial for peak performance.

Is it Bad to Use an Electrolyte Drink When Not Working Out?

Electrolytes support daily bodily functions and are necessary even on non-workout days. Factors like stress, heat, and illness can deplete hydration, necessitating daily electrolyte intake.

Can You Consume Too Many Electrolytes?

Yes, it's possible to consume too many electrolytes, leading to imbalances and health issues. It's crucial to balance electrolyte intake with your level of activity and overall diet.

What Are the Side Effects of Too Many Electrolytes?

Excessive electrolyte consumption can lead to conditions like hypernatremia and hyperkalemia, causing symptoms like dizziness, vomiting, and irregular heartbeat.

What is the Healthiest Source of Electrolytes?

Natural sources like coconut water, milk, fruit juice, and smoothies are excellent for replenishing electrolytes, alongside well-formulated electrolyte powders for convenience.

When Will My Order be Shipped?

Orders are shipped the next business day, ensuring prompt delivery to support your hydration and performance needs.

Does Transparent Labs Ship Internationally?

Yes, Transparent Labs ships worldwide, with exceptions due to fraudulent activity in specific countries.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

Yes, it contains tree nuts (coconut).

name: Lean Pre-Workout
description_html:
Overview 

Are you tired of "cutting pre-workouts" that just don't...cut it? If so, you've come to the right spot! Transparent Labs Lean Pre-Workout is an evidence-based pre-workout formula featuring clinical doses of ergogenic ingredients that help you perform your best in the gym while supporting your fat-loss efforts. Experience the difference of a true cutting pre-workout formula that gets you dialed in for every training session by enhancing blood flow, strength, endurance, focus, drive, and energy production. 

Each ingredient in this pre-workout supplement was carefully chosen based on scientific research and quality characteristics, two factors that are sadly overlooked far too often in the sports supplement realm. Like all of our products, Lea Pre-Workout has fully transparent labeling, and absolutely no artificial color/food dyes, artificial sweeteners, or artificial flavoring.

Key Features

  • Clinically Dosed Pre-Workout for Lean Mass Retention and Fat Loss: Transparent Labs LEAN Pre-Workout is an evidence-based pre-workout that enhances athletic performance while supporting fat loss.

  • Improves Strength, Stamina, and Muscle Pumps During Training: With a comprehensive lineup of clinically dosed nitric oxide boosters and ergogenic aids, LEAN Pre-Workout augments athletic performance and increases blood flow to muscle tissue starting from the very first scoop.

  • Provides an Immediate Energy Boost with Natural Caffeine: Leave even the most intense workouts in the dust with clean nootropics like PurCaf® caffeine, theobromine, acetyl-L-carnitine, and choline bitartrate. 

  • Choose from 8 Refreshing All-Natural Flavors Sweetened with Stevia: Most pre-workouts come loaded with artificial colors, sweeteners, or flavors. We know you care about what you put in your body, so our goal was to make LEAN a great-tasting pre-workout with natural flavoring and stevia instead of the hidden junk you find in other caffeine-infused pre-workouts.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

*Doses listed are per serving (1 full scoop)

L-Citrulline Malate (2:1) | 6,000 mg

L-citrulline is an amino acid naturally found in watermelon that plays an important role in kidney function. It's become a popular ingredient in pre-workout supplements due to its ability to boost nitric oxide levels [1]. When nitric oxide production increases, blood flow improves, allowing nutrients and oxygen to replenish muscle tissue more efficiently. Ultimately, this translates to greater muscle pumps and heightened energy levels.

Numerous studies have demonstrated the ergogenic effects of L-citrulline malate, the citrulline salt of malic acid, such as:

  • Improving strength, aerobic performance, and muscle endurance [2, 3]

  • Elevating nitric oxide levels even more than equivalent doses of L-arginine [4]

  • Enhancing muscle anabolism and reducing muscle catabolism [5]

Beta-Alanine | 2,000 mg

Beta-alanine is a beta-amino acid that combines with L-histidine to form a dipeptide known as carnosine. Supplementing with beta-alanine has been shown to increase muscle carnosine levels, which are quickly depleted during intense exercise [6].

Carnosine is an endogenous dipeptide that functions as a buffer in muscle cells, thereby attenuating the accumulation of acidic byproducts of muscular exertion (e.g. lactate and hydrogen ions) [7]. Hence, bolstering muscle carnosine levels—via beta-alanine—allows you to push yourself longer and harder in the gym.

Pre-workout supplements almost always contain beta-alanine but in inefficacious doses. We made sure to include an evidence-based dose of beta-alanine (2,000 mg) in every scoop of LEAN Pre-Workout. Relevant evidence-based benefits of beta-alanine include:

  • Delaying the onset of neuromuscular fatigue during intense exercise [8]

  • Increasing overall muscle strength [9] 

  • Improving muscle endurance and total work capacity [10]

  • Reducing and combatting the formation of dysfunctional proteins and promoting the formation of healthy proteins [11]

  • Significantly increasing lean muscle mass as part of a diligent resistance-training program [12]

*Note that beta-alanine causes a benign tingling sensation known as paresthesia while the body acclimates to higher carnosine levels. This effect is harmless and gradually lessens with consistent use.

BetaPure™ Betaine Anhydrous | 1,500 mg

Betaine, also known as trimethylglycine, is a naturally occurring metabolite that serves as a methyl donor and osmolyte in the body. Though the mechanisms are not entirely understood, betaine supplementation has shown promise in enhancing power output and, to a lesser extent, endurance capacity in athletes [13, 14, 15]. It is plausible that betaine supplementation promotes athletic performance by maintaining cellular hydration and reducing homocysteine levels, thereby encouraging healthy cardiovascular function and blood flow [16].

Acetyl-L-Carnitine (ALCAR) | 1,000 mg

Acetyl-L-carnitine (ALCAR) is a bioavailable form of L-carnitine, an essential molecule for transporting fatty acids across mitochondrial membranes so they can be used for energy. ALCAR is suggested to have diverse ergogenic properties for athletes and gym-goers due to its potent nootropic effects that promote healthy mood and cognitive function and protect against neurodegeneration [17, 18]. 

ALCAR may also enhance physical performance and target stubborn fat by facilitating fatty acid oxidation [19, 20].

Choline Bitartrate | 500 mg

Choline is an essential micronutrient for cholinergic transmission and, by extension, cognitive function. This ingredient can enhance physical and mental performance by increasing acetylcholine and supporting lipid metabolism [21, 22].

PurCaf® Organic Caffeine | 180 mg

While most pre-workouts contain synthetic caffeine anhydrous, we formulated LEAN Pre-Workout with organic caffeine derived from green coffee beans (as PurCaf®). On the molecular level, caffeine (chemically known as 1,3,7-trimethylxanthine) is an alkaline, organic substance derived from xanthine — a biologically important purine base found in many bodily tissues and fluids. Methylxanthines like caffeine and theobromine stimulate the central nervous system (CNS) and heart to promote wakefulness and motivation.

Numerous studies have shown that taking caffeine before exercise can significantly improve overall performance, largely by reducing the rate of perceived exertion [23]. Caffeine may also enhance endurance and strength by increasing fatty acid oxidation and sparing muscle glycogen [24].

L-Theanine | 180 mg

L-theanine is an isomer of the amino acids L-glutamate and L-glutamine. It was discovered centuries ago as one of the primary amino acids in green tea leaves and is also found in various mushroom species.

L-theanine is highly bioavailable when taken orally and actively traverses the blood-brain barrier to enhance mental acuity and attenuate stress [25, 26]. Its nootropic effects are appropriately described as "alert relaxation," which is to say it promotes a sense of calmness while improving focus. L-theanine can also help take the edge off of stimulants, particularly caffeine. In fact, research shows that pairing L-theanine with caffeine creates a nootropic synergy that bolsters cognitive function and alertness more effectively than taking either nootropic on its own [27].

Theobromine | 50 mg

Theobromine is the primary alkaloid found in cocoa beans and is essentially the “little brother” of caffeine. Its functions in the body are suggested to be complementary to those of caffeine, acting as a phosphodiesterase inhibitor and central nervous system stimulant [28].

Research has also found that theobromine has differential contributions to mood and cognitive function compared to caffeine, providing further insight into the distinct yet synergistic nature of these naturally occurring stimulants [29].

BioPerine® | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [30, 31]. Hence, BioPerine® helps your body better absorb and utilize the other active ingredients in LEAN Pre-Workout.

Huperzine A | 100 mcg

A recent research review contends that huperzine-A, a constituent of the Chinese folk medicine Huperzia serrata, is a good therapeutic candidate for cognitive decline [32]. This natural nootropic may help boost memory and improve cognitive function by reducing the breakdown of acetylcholine [33].

How to Use

For Beginners to Pre-Workout Supplements

To assess tolerance, mix 1/2 scoop of Transparent Labs Lean Pre-Workout with 6 to 8 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach. If the effects feel subtle, increase to a full scoop before the next workout.

For Experienced Pre-Workout Supplement Users

Mix 1 full scoop of Transparent Labs Lean Pre-Workout with 10 to 12 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach.

Third-Party Testing

Please click below for third-party testing results from the most recent batch of Lean Pre-Workout:

FAQs

How Much Caffeine Does LEAN Pre-Workout Have?

Each serving contains approximately 162 mg of caffeine from organic green coffee beans (180 mg at 90% caffeine).

Can I Take Lean Pre-Workout on Non-Training Days?

Yes, you can take Lean Pre-Workout on non-training days if you want an energy boost. However, remember that this product contains caffeine and may cause restlessness if taken within 5 hours of bedtime.

Can I Take LEAN Pre-Workout if I am Subjected to Drug Testing for my Sport?

Yes, absolutely. Transparent Labs Lean Pre-Workout contains zero banned substances and is Informed Choice certified for athletes.

Why Doesn't LEAN Pre-Workout Contain Creatine?

Large doses of caffeine may interfere with the ergogenic effects of creatine [47]; since Lean Pre-Workout contains caffeine, we decided to keep the creatine separate.

What is the Difference Between Transparent Labs BULK, LEAN, and STIM-FREE Pre-Workouts?

Bulk is designed to support lean muscle growth and includes testosterone-supporting micronutrients, while Lean is designed to support fat loss and includes a thyroid support complex. Stim-Free, as the name suggests, contains zero stimulants and has added elevATP® for energy production.

I Don't Live in the United States, Can I Still Buy PreSeries LEAN?

Yes - our fulfillment center allows us to ship worldwide (with some exceptions due to fraudulent activity in certain countries; see here for more info). Standard shipping for international orders typically takes 10-14 business days to arrive.

Does this Product Contain Nuts?

No! While Transparent Labs Lean Pre-Workout is manufactured in a facility that processes nuts (coconuts and peanuts), we have an allergen control program that requires sanitization and cleaning of the manufacturing equipment to avoid cross-contamination of allergenic and hypoallergenic materials.

name: Mag AM + PM
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Mag AM + PM is a comprehensive AM + PM magnesium supplement combination featuring four innovative, scientifically validated forms of bioavailable magnesium, including ATA Mg®, Magtein®, Sucrosomial® Magnesium, and Magnesium Bisglycinate. Magnesium is an integral cofactor for over 300 biochemical reactions in the body, and it is now clear that deficiency of this mineral can lead to a range of physical and mental health issues, hinder athletic performance, and impair recovery [1, 2].

Health-conscious consumers, athletes, and gym-goers are taking an interest in magnesium supplementation due to recent estimates that upwards of 40% of Americans do not consume enough of this key electrolyte mineral, often despite taking a magnesium supplement [3]. Unlike common forms of supplemental magnesium (e.g., magnesium citrate and magnesium oxide), the forms in Mag AM + PM are highly absorbable and gentle on the gastrointestinal tract, making them ideal for ongoing use and maintaining adequate magnesium levels in the body.

Key Features

  • Contains 4 Unique Magnesium Forms for Enhanced Absorption: The efficacy of magnesium supplements hinges on the bioavailability of magnesium formulations. Sadly, many commercially available products contain low-quality magnesium salts, which are poorly absorbed and can cause gastrointestinal side effects. The magnesium forms found in Mag AM + PM are gentle on the stomach and have superior absorption kinetics, helping your body absorb and use the magnesium more effectively.

  • Targeted Magnesium Delivery for Systemic Health Benefits: Each form of magnesium in Mag AM + PM has a distinct absorption and metabolism profile designed to complement one another for systemic health benefits, such as supporting brain health, muscle function, sleep quality, and more.

  • 30-Day Supply to Cover Your Daily Magnesium Needs: Mag AM + PM provides 106% of the RDA (recommended daily allowance) for magnesium with just one serving (each) of the AM + PM formulation to easily and effectively increase your magnesium intake.

  • Pure, Quality Ingredients (No Fillers or Nonsense): Consistent with our core values, each batch of Transparent Labs Mag AM + PM is third-party tested for purity, potency, and authenticity.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

ATA Mg® | 700 mg

ATA Mg® (Magnesium N-Acetyl Taurinate) is an innovative, patented form of magnesium produced by combining magnesium with acetyl-taurine, a natural metabolite of taurine. The acetylation of taurine facilitates greater magnesium transport across cell membranes, making magnesium N-acetyl taurinate one of the most intriguing yet underappreciated forms of supplemental magnesium [4]. 

In addition to being highly bioavailable, magnesium N-acetyl taurinate is a popular subject of recent research, evaluating its impact on cardiovascular function, nervous system function, ocular/vision health, and skeletal muscle recovery. [5, 6, 7]. Preliminary studies are promising and suggest that this specific form of magnesium helps regulate neurotransmitter activity and calm the nervous system [8].

Magtein® | 2,000 mg

Magtein® is an innovative, clinically studied magnesium salt that combines magnesium with threonic acid, a naturally occurring metabolite of ascorbic acid (vitamin C). Magnesium L-threonate is distinct from other forms of magnesium in that it has superior bioavailability across the blood-brain barrier; thus, it increases magnesium levels in the brain and cerebrospinal fluid more effectively than other forms of magnesium [9, 10, 11].

The increase in brain magnesium concentrations after taking magnesium L-threonate is consistently associated with improved synaptic density and plasticity in the hippocampus, which is critical for learning and memory [12, 13, 14]. Studies also indicate that this form of magnesium can support neurological health and function through multimodal mechanisms of action (e.g., enhancing mitochondrial density in neurons and bolstering glial cells) [15, 16, 17]. 

Sucrosomial® Magnesium | 600 mg

Sucrosomial® magnesium is the result of nanotechnology advances in recent years that led to the creation of “sucrosomes,” which are cell-like matrices comprised of phospholipids and sucrose esters. The sucrosome protects the encapsulated magnesium ions in a protective layer that passes through the gastrointestinal tract more efficiently, minimizing the degradation that often occurs with other forms of supplemental magnesium [18]. 

The phospholipid-based coating facilitates absorption into the bloodstream, making it more efficacious [19]. Another advantage of Sucrosomial® magnesium is that it can be taken in large doses without causing adverse GI effects. 

Magnesium Bisglycinate Chelate | 600mg

One of the most bioavailable forms of magnesium is magnesium bisglycinate—a chelated form of magnesium where the mineral is bonded to glycine, an amino acid. This specific form is noted for its superior absorption and minimal gastrointestinal side effects compared to other forms, such as magnesium oxide [20]. 

The enhanced absorbability of magnesium bisglycinate can be attributed to glycine acting as a transport molecule, facilitating magnesium passage through the intestinal wall. As a result, a greater proportion of ingested magnesium is absorbed into the bloodstream, thereby increasing overall bioavailability. 

How To Use

For Mag AM: Take four (4) capsules daily as a dietary supplement, preferably on an empty stomach in the morning. (This can be taken with a meal if you prefer.)

For Mag PM: Take three (3) capsules daily as a dietary supplement, preferably on an empty stomach in the evening. (This can be taken with a meal if you prefer.)

Optimal Consumption Times

Magnesium can be taken any time of day, but it's generally best to take the AM and PM formulas at their designated timeframes. 

FAQs

How Much Magnesium Should I Take Per Day?

You should consume at least the reference daily intake (RDI) of all vitamins as consistently as possible. Thankfully, Mag AM/PM is designed to provide over 100% of the RDI in a daily serving.

Does Magnesium Need to be Taken with Calcium for Proper Absorption?

Not necessarily. While calcium is necessary for magnesium absorption, the body tightly regulates blood calcium levels. Calcium deficiency is quite rare since bones serve as a sizable reservoir of calcium. Moreover, many forms of magnesium are readily absorbed without co-ingesting calcium. Nevertheless, you can take a calcium supplement or eat calcium-rich food with your AM or PM dose of Mag AM + PM. 

When is the Best Time to Take Magnesium?

For the most part, magnesium supplements can be taken whenever it is most convenient for you. If you’re taking magnesium for general health and longevity benefits, it’s best to take it with a meal or shortly before. If you’re consuming a magnesium form known to cause laxation (citrate or oxide), split the doses throughout the day to avoid stomach upset. When in doubt, follow the directions on the label.

Why Does Magnesium Cause Digestive Upset?

Certain forms of magnesium can cause digestive upset and diarrhea primarily due to poor bioavailability. Unabsorbed magnesium creates an osmotic effect, drawing water into the intestine. Mag AM + PM is formulated for superior absorption, limiting the digestive issues associated with poor bioavailability.
