name: Mass Gainer
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Mass Gainer formula offers whole food-based, muscle-building nutrients in a delicious, easily digestible powder form—perfect as a meal replacement shake and for post-workout recovery during a bulking phase.

Unlike many weight-gainer powders, we prioritize high-quality, natural ingredients to help you gain serious mass while supporting overall health and longevity.

Key Features:

  • Quality Source of Muscle-Building Protein: Eating plenty of protein is key to building muscle, and each serving of Transparent Labs Mass Gainer provides 50+ grams of rapidly digesting protein from Grass-Fed Whey Protein Concentrate.

  • Easy Calorie Boost: No more excuses for falling short of your calorie-intake goal; Transparent Labs Mass Gainer packs 750 calories per serving to help you achieve your weight-gain goals and pack on lean muscle mass.

  • Added Creatine Monohydrate: If you had to pick one supplement to take for reaping the most benefits of weight training, it's tough to do better than creatine monohydrate. This is why we included 3 grams of pure creatine monohydrate in each serving of Transparent Labs Mass Gainer.

  • Clean Carbs and Healthy Fats: With over 100 grams of slow- and fast-digesting carbohydrates from wholesome sources like non-GMO tapioca maltodextrin, sweet potato flour, and VitaFiber®, plus 14 grams of healthy fats (medium-chain triglycerides) per serving, Transparent Labs Mass Gainer is the ultimate muscle-building "meal in a shaker cup" (especially for individuals who struggle to eat enough for muscle growth throughout the day).

  • Delicious Chocolate and Vanilla Flavors: Choose from two decadent flavors—Chocolate Glaze Donut and Sweet Vanilla.

  • No Artificial Sweeteners, Fillers, or Colors: You won't find any "funny business" with the ingredients we use. Instead of the usual laundry list of artificial additives, Transparent Labs Mass Gainer is naturally-flavored and sweetened with stevia; plus, there are no added sugars.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

*Refer to label for ingredient doses (vary by flavor)

Grass-fed Whey Protein Concentrate

Protein, especially complete protein (i.e. a protein source that provides all nine essential amino acids), is paramount for muscle protein synthesis, which ultimately contributes to muscle growth. Unlike many mass gainers that use low-quality protein sources, Transparent Labs Mass Gainer features grass-fed whey protein concentrate, a clean, easy-to-digest, complete protein well-known to bolster muscle growth [1].

Healthy Fats (from MCT Oil and Coconut Milk)

Not all fat is "bad"; in fact, some fats are quite healthy and necessary (especially for weight gain). We've upped the ante by including an ample dose of medium-chain triglycerides (MCTs) from MCT oil and coconut milk. MCTs are a special class of saturated fatty acids that are quickly absorbed and provide unique health benefits, such as increasing high-density lipoprotein (HDL) cholesterol (aka the "good" cholesterol) and fighting inflammation [2].

Organic Tapioca Maltodextrin, Oat Flour, and Sweet Potato Powder

The carbohydrates in our weight-gain formula come from real food sources, including organic tapioca, oat flour, and sweet potato. This blend provides a balanced, easy-to-digest supply of fast-acting, long-lasting energy and replenishes muscle glycogen after workouts.

Tapioca Fiber and VitaFiber®

Fiber intake is essential for maintaining gut health and supporting digestion, especially with a high-protein diet. The prebiotic fiber sources in Transparent Labs Mass Gainer, like VitaFiber®, feed the "friendly" microbes in your gastrointestinal tract, helping them grow and proliferate so you can better digest nutrients and stay “regular”.

Creatine Monohydrate

Creatine monohydrate has stood the test of time, and then some. It is the most proven athletic supplement, with decades of scientific evidence demonstrating its positive impacts on muscle-building, recovery, and athletic performance [3, 4].

How to Use

Follow these simple steps to maximize your muscle-building potential with Transparent Labs Mass Gainer and ensure you're getting the most out of every shake:

Mixing Instructions

  • For a Perfect Weight-Gain Shake: Add two heaping scoops (scoop included in the container) of Transparent Labs Mass Gainer to 16 ounces of water or milk in a shaker cup with a wire whisk ball. If you prefer a richer, creamier texture and additional calories, opt for milk—whole or low-fat varieties are best.

  • Shake It Up: Secure the lid on your shaker cup and shake vigorously until the powder is completely dissolved and the mixture is smooth. No clumps should be present for the best taste and texture experience.

Optimal Consumption Times

  • Post-Exercise Recovery: The ideal time to consume Transparent Labs Mass Gainer is immediately after you finish working out. This timing takes advantage of the critical post-workout period when your muscles are primed for recovery and growth.

  • Meal Replacement: On days you're not working out or when you need an extra calorie boost, Transparent Labs Mass Gainer can serve as a high-calorie meal replacement or an addition to your meals to help meet your daily caloric and nutritional needs.

Gradual Introduction

  • Start Slow (1/2 Serving): For those new to mass gainers, begin with half a serving (1 heaping scoop) daily for the first week. This allows your body to adjust to the increased caloric intake and assess your digestive tolerance.

  • Increase to One Full Serving: Gradually increase to a full serving (2 heaping scoops) after you've had time to acclimate to using a mass gainer.

Use Daily for Maximum Effectiveness

  • Consistency Is Key: For best results, incorporate Transparent Labs Mass Gainer into your daily nutrition regimen. Regular use, combined with a balanced diet and intense training program, will support significant gains in muscle mass and strength.

  • Storage: To preserve the potency, store Mass Gainer in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Ensure the lid is tightly sealed to maintain freshness and prevent moisture from affecting the powder.

FAQs

Is a Mass Gainer the Same as a Protein Powder?

No. While mass gainers contain protein, they are not the same as protein powders. A protein powder typically contains just protein (with small/trace amounts of fat and carbs), whereas a weight (mass) gainer is formulated with protein plus carbs and fats; hence, weight gainers have considerably more calories than protein powders, and are better suited for muscle-building and weight gain.

Is it OK to Use a Mass Gainer Every Day?

Yes, you can use Transparent Labs Mass Gainer daily. However, it's important to use it as a supplement to other calorie-contributing foods and not as your primary source of nutrients.

Will Mass Gainer Help Me Build Muscle Mass Even if I Don't Workout?

No. Your muscles need a stimulus for hypertrophy to occur, and resistance training is the best (natural) way to provide that stimulus. Nutrients, especially protein, help your muscles rebuild after you've "damaged" them from exercise. If you remove exercise from the equation but continue eating a surplus of calories, you will gain mostly body fat (which may be beneficial and necessary if you're severely underweight).

Are there Side Effects of Taking a Mass Gainer?

Generally, mass gainer supplements are well-tolerated, but digestive discomfort and bloating may occur in some instances, depending on your overall diet, gastrointestinal integrity, and inherent ingredient tolerances. We strongly recommend starting with a half-serving of Transparent Labs Mass Gainer for the first week so you can better assess how it affects your body.

Does Transparent Labs Mass Gainer Contain Nuts?

Yes, it contains coconut and milk-based ingredients. Do not consume if you have an allergy to tree nuts or dairy.

Transparent Labs offers worldwide shipping, with a few exceptions due to import restrictions in the EU/UK, and high fraudulent activity in specific countries. Please check our shipping policy for more details.

When Will My Order Be Shipped Out?

All orders are dispatched the following business day.

name: Multivitamin Supplement
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Multivitamin is a premium, all-natural, vegan-friendly formula containing essential vitamins and minerals from organic sources that align with your holistic and active lifestyle. This multivitamin is a foundation of wellness and longevity, serving as a daily staple that mimics the biocompatibility of obtaining these essential nutrients from wholesome food sources.

It also includes additional sources of plant-based vitamins K1, K2, and D3, which work synergistically to promote skin health, immune function, bone integrity, cardiovascular function, and more. This formula goes the extra mile with LuteMax 20/20®, a patented antioxidant complex featuring 20 mg of lutein and 4 mg of zeaxanthin to promote ocular health/vision and overall cellular integrity.

Key Features

All-Natural, Organic Multivitamin Formula for Active Adults: Our whole-food multivitamin features naturally occurring micronutrients from organic sources, such as RGen™ herbal extracts, VegD3® Plant-Based Vitamin D, and Biogrown® Vitamin K1 + MenaQ7® Vitamin K2.

Biocompatible Micronutrients in a Convenient Once-Daily Dose: Transparent Labs Multivitamin is formulated with biocompatible vitamins and minerals that the body can properly absorb and utilize.

Added Ocular/Vision Support Complex: Thanks to LuteMax 20/20®, this multivitamin formula protects vision and overall ocular health with key antioxidants (lutein and zeaxanthin) that are known for preventing macular degeneration.

30 Servings Per Bottle: Our multivitamin supplement provides 30 days worth of servings to help you meet your micronutrient needs with the right vitamins and minerals.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Vitamin A (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts)| 150 mcg RAE

Beta-carotene is a "pre-vitamin" commonly found in orange-colored vegetables like carrots and sweet potatoes. The body converts beta-carotene into retinol, an active form of vitamin A that supports cell growth and differentiation in the retina, as well as skin and immune health.

Vitamin C (as Liposomal Pureway-C® (90mg) and RGen™ Herbal Extracts (50mg) | 140 mg

Vitamin C is a ubiquitous antioxidant for collagen synthesis, immune function, and wound healing. It enhances the absorption of non-heme iron from plant-based foods and protects cells from oxidative stress by neutralizing free radicals.

Veg D3® Vitamin D3 (as Plant-Based Cholecalciferol) | 25 mcg (1,000 IU)

The "sunshine" vitamin is a key regulator of calcium and phosphorus absorption in the gut. It supports bone health, endocrine function, immunity, cell growth, and neuromuscular function.

Vitamin E (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 33.5 mg

Vitamin E is a fat-soluble antioxidant that scavenges free radicals, preventing them from damaging cell membranes, DNA, and proteins. This protective effect helps maintain the integrity of cellular and subcellular structures, particularly of the skin, eyes, and immune system.

Vitamin K1 and K2 (as BIOGROWN® K1 and MenaQ7® K2) | 300 mcg

Vitamin K is a group of fat-soluble vitamins that regulate blood clotting and bone health. These essential nutrients activate proteins involved in blood coagulation and work with vitamin D to regulate calcium deposition in bones and prevent arterial calcification.

Vitamin B1 (as Thiamine from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 12.5 mg

Thiamine (vitamin B1) is a cofactor involved in energy metabolism, particularly in converting carbohydrates into adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the energy currency of cells.

Vitamin B2 (as Riboflavin from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 12.5 mg

Riboflavin is a key component of two coenzymes, flavin mononucleotide (FMN) and flavin adenine dinucleotide (FAD), which are involved in various metabolic reactions. These coenzymes are necessary for converting nutrients from food into energy, thereby supporting the growth and repair of body tissues.

Vitamin B3 (as Niacin from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 17.5 mg

Niacin is a precursor of nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD) and nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide phosphate (NADP), two key coenzymes for energy production, DNA repair, cell signaling, and maintaining healthy cholesterol levels.

Vitamin B6 (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 25 mg

Pyridoxal-5'-phosphate (P5P), the active form of vitamin B6, is involved in over 100 enzymatic reactions, mostly related to protein metabolism. It also plays an important role in neurotransmitter synthesis, red blood cell formation, and homocysteine regulation, thus supporting cardiovascular health.

Folate (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 200 mcg DFE

Folate, also known as vitamin B9, is especially important for cell growth and division, DNA synthesis, and red blood cell production. Folate and vitamin B12 are synergistic cofactors in converting homocysteine to methionine. High levels of homocysteine have been linked to an increased risk of heart disease, stroke, and cognitive decline. By working together, folate and B12 help keep homocysteine levels in check, promoting cardiovascular and cognitive health.

Vitamin B12 (as Re-Natured® Methylcobalamin) | 2.4 mcg

Vitamin B12 is imperative for DNA synthesis, nerve function, and red blood cell formation. It works with folate (vitamin B9) to regulate homocysteine levels and is essential for nervous system health. Nutritional deficits of B12 commonly lead to anemia and neurological issues.

Biotin (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 50 mcg

Biotin assists with the metabolism of fats, carbohydrates, and proteins. It is particularly important for healthy hair, skin, and nails and for the enzymatic functions of energy production and fatty acid synthesis.

Magnesium (as Aquamin® Marine-Sourced Magnesium) | 100 mg

Magnesium is an electrolyte mineral and cofactor in over 300 biochemical reactions in the body. It plays an indispensable role in energy production, protein synthesis, muscle and nerve function, and blood glucose control. The marine-sourced citrate form is highly absorbable and supports muscle relaxation and cardiovascular health.

Zinc (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 3.8 mg

Zinc is a crucial trace mineral involved in a multitude of vital biological functions, especially immunity, reproduction, and hormonal balance.

Selenium (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 35 mcg

Selenium is an antioxidant that protects cells from oxidative damage and supports thyroid function by converting thyroid hormones (e.g. thyroxine to thyronine). It is also important for immune function and may reduce the risk of certain cancers.

Manganese (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 1.3 mg

Manganese is another trace mineral necessary for bone formation, blood clotting, and reducing inflammation. It is also a cofactor for various metabolic enzymes and connective tissue synthesis.

Chromium (from RGen™ Herbal Extracts) | 60 mcg

Chromium is a trace mineral that enhances insulin action, thereby supporting blood sugar regulation and carbohydrate metabolism.

LuteMax® 20/20 Lutein and Zeaxanthin (from Aztec Marigold Flower Extract) | 200 mg

Lutemax 2020 is a patented extract naturally derived from Aztec Marigold flowers containing all three nutritionally relevant macular carotenoids—lutein, RR-zeaxanthin, and RS (meso)-zeaxanthin—in the same 5:1 ratio found in the diet. This unique combination of carotenoids is backed by multiple clinical studies showing it can improve visual acuity, cognitive function, sleep quality, and more.

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, take one serving (4 capsules) with your first meal of the day. Alternatively, you may take 1/2 serving (2 capsules) with your first and last meals of the day. Do not exceed four capsules per day.

FAQs

Is it Good to Take Multivitamin Tablets Daily? 

Multivitamin tablets can be beneficial for individuals experiencing micronutrient deficiencies. Many people take a daily multivitamin as part of a balanced diet to fill nutritional gaps and "cover all their bases."

How Do I Choose the Right Multivitamin Product? 

Different populations have distinct nutritional needs; for example, pregnant women should opt for formulations containing folic acid and iron, while seniors might benefit from multivitamins fortified with vitamin D and calcium. A healthcare professional can provide personalized guidance based on individual health profiles and dietary habits. 

Should You Take Multivitamins at Night or in The Morning? 

The optimal timing for multivitamin intake can vary based on personal routine and the specific formulation of the multivitamin. Generally, it is recommended to take multivitamins with a meal to enhance nutrient absorption and reduce gastrointestinal discomfort. Taking multivitamins in the morning can align easily with breakfast and establish a routine.

What Are the Benefits of Multivitamin Supplements? 

Multivitamin supplements offer several potential benefits, particularly for individuals who struggle to meet their nutritional needs through diet alone. They can effectively fill nutritional gaps, ensuring adequate intake of essential vitamins and minerals. For certain populations, such as vegetarians, vegans, lactose-intolerant individuals, pregnant women, and those with specific medical conditions, multivitamins can be indispensable in preventing deficiencies.

Who Might Need to Avoid Taking Multivitamins? 

While multivitamins can be beneficial for many, some individuals might need to avoid them. Those with certain medical conditions, such as hemochromatosis, should be cautious with multivitamins containing iron. Moreover, specific medications may interact with high doses of certain vitamins. It is imperative to consult a healthcare provider before starting any supplementation regimen to avoid adverse effects and ensure it aligns with one's overall health strategy.

name: Pea Protein Isolate
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs Pea Protein Isolate is a delicious, USDA-certified organic, dairy-free, gluten-free, plant-based protein powder providing 28 grams of complete protein per serving. Our pea protein powder is made from organic yellow peas and packs 28 grams of protein per serving to help vegans and vegetarians meet their protein intake needs and fitness goals. This protein can also be used in almost any diet and combined with other protein supplements, like whey protein powders.

As a complete protein source, pea protein powder contains all nine essential amino acids (and a generous amount of branched-chain amino acids) to facilitate muscle protein synthesis and support muscle growth and recovery. It's also virtually sugar-free, easily digested, and contains absolutely no artificial sweeteners (e.g. acesulfame potassium and aspartame), artificial food coloring, or artificial flavoring.

Key Features

USDA-Certified Organic Pea Protein Powder: We source our pea protein isolate from USDA-certified organic yellow split peas that provide highly bioavailable protein and a complete amino acid profile to support muscle mass, body composition, and overall health.

Provides 28 Grams of Complete Protein Per Scoop: Just one scoop (~38 g) of Transparent Labs Pea Protein powder packs 28 grams of high-quality protein, ideal for post-workout recovery or any time you need a simple, tasty way to get extra protein throughout the day.

Simple, Healthy Way to Increase Protein Intake on a Plant-Based Diet: If you're looking for an excellent alternative to animal-based protein powders, our pea protein powder is the answer. In addition to being naturally gluten-free and dairy-free, the protein in yellow peas is a rich source of dietary iron and calcium, two minerals that may be lacking in a plant-based diet.

No Artificial Flavoring, Artificial Sweeteners, or Artificial Food Coloring: We know you care about what you put in your body, and far too often protein supplements are jam-packed with unnecessary additives. This is why Transparent Labs Pea Protein powder is made with all-natural flavoring and sweetened with stevia extract.

Delicious Vanilla and Chocolate Flavors: Protein powders, especially plant-based varieties, are notorious for their gritty texture and lackluster flavor. Our goal with Transparent Labs Pea Protein Isolate was to make a vegan protein powder that mixes easily, tastes great, and has a smooth texture. After all, who said protein shakes have to taste like watered-down chalk?

Active Ingredients and Benefits

*Doses listed are per serving (~39 grams)

Organic Pea Protein Isolate | 36.6 grams

Transparent Labs Pea Protein powder features organic pea protein isolate derived from whole yellow split peas (Pisum sativum), a common dietary legume native to Eurasia. Yellow split peas are naturally rich in vitamin C, calcium, iron, magnesium, and dietary fiber. 

However, the protein content of whole peas is relatively low, at just 8 grams per 100-gram portion, so consuming an adequate amount of protein from whole peas is somewhat impractical. This is where pea protein powder comes in handy since it contains mostly protein and micronutrients found in whole peas without all the carbohydrates, making it an excellent option for plant-based diets.

Like whey protein, pea protein is technically a complete protein [1]. Pea protein has a lower amount of branched-chain amino acids compared to whey protein, so a slightly higher intake of pea protein is necessary to achieve a commensurate anabolic response [2].

The major storage proteins of peas are globulins which are further classified as legumin, vicilin, and convicilin, each of which is characteristically high in the essential amino acid lysine, which is commonly lacking in other plant proteins [3]. While peas get criticized for having a low proportion of methione (another essential amino acid), this characteristic is one reason that pea protein powder is only weakly acidic—unlike animal proteins—and promotes an alkaline state [4]. 

Moreover, pea protein is rich in isoflavones that may play a role in reducing the risk of cancer, lowering cholesterol levels and blood pressure, and fighting inflammation [5, 6].

How To Use

As a dietary supplement, add one (1) scoop of Transparent Labs Pea Protein Isolate with 6-8 oz of water or plant-based milk and mix thoroughly before consuming. We recommend consuming 1-3 scoops per day to help meet your protein demands.

Mixing Instructions

Transparent Labs Pea Protein Isolate mixes best by using a blender or shaker bottle. It can also be added to recipes for baked goods and semi-soft foods, like oatmeal and yogurt.

Optimal Consumption Times

The complete amino acid profile of yellow split peas makes pea protein powder an exceptional way to kickstart muscle recovery after exercise. However, pea protein powder is a quality protein source that can be consumed any time to help you meet your protein intake goal.

FAQ`s

What is Pea Protein Isolate?

Pea protein isolate is simply protein isolated from whole peas. It is made by extracting the protein from whole peas, leaving behind most of the starch and sugar.

Is Pea Protein Isolate Suitable for Vegans and Vegetarians?

Yes, our pea protein powder is ideal for vegans and vegetarians who want a simple, healthy way to increase protein intake. No milk or other animal products are used to make pea protein.

How Do I Use Pea Protein Isolate?

Please refer to the "How to Use" section above.

Is Pea Protein Isolate Allergen-Free?

It depends on the allergen(s) in question. While peas are generally considered to be hypoallergenic, there is evidence of type-1 allergic reactions to food products containing peas (though this is rare) [7].

Can Pea Protein Isolate Help with Muscle Recovery and Muscle Growth?

Absolutely! We recommend consuming 1 scoop of pea protein isolate shortly after you finish exercising to facilitate muscle protein synthesis.

How Does Pea Protein Isolate Compare to Other Protein Sources (e.g. Whey Protein Powder)?

Pea protein and whey protein are both complete protein sources (meaning they contain all nine essential amino acids in adequate proportion). However, pea protein has a slightly lower amount of BCAAs and methionine that whey protein, so the dose of protein needs to be increased to compensate. This is why our pea protein powder provides 28 grams of protein per serving.

Is Pea Protein Isolate Easy to Digest?

Yes, pea protein is readily digested in humans [8].

description_html:
Overview

Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has become a pantry staple among health-conscious consumers who want a quality source of protein for supporting muscle growth, recovery, and overall health. Unlike many protein powders on the market, TL whey protein isolate is sourced from grass-fed cattle, raised humanely and without the use of growth hormones or hormonal agents, and contains absolutely no artificial sweeteners, food dyes, or fillers.

Choose from 14 (and counting) delicious flavor options, or select the unflavored option if you prefer a pure whey protein isolate powder with a neutral taste. Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate is easy to mix with liquids and can be incorporated into various recipes, making it a convenient and versatile protein source that fits easily into any diet.

Key Features:

28 grams of protein per serving, boasting an industry-leading protein-by-weight percentage of 87.5% (may vary slightly by flavor).

Sourced exclusively from grass-fed American dairy cattle, raised without the use of growth hormone, growth factors, and/or anabolic steroids.

Made with natural ingredients and no artificial sweeteners, fillers, food dyes, gluten, or preservatives.

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Virtually lactose-free and only 1 gram of fat per serving, perfect for adding an easily digestible, quality source of protein to your diet.

Trusted by the best to be the best, with an overall rating of 98 out of 100 by Labdoor and backed by athletes like Paul Sklar & Hafthor Björnsson, Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has set a standard as the cleanest whey protein powder available.

Available in 14 delicious flavors that cater to every palate while supporting lean muscle growth and overall protein intake.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate

The quality of your protein matters, and whey protein isolate is one of the purest forms of protein available. It provides a high protein content with minimal fats and carbohydrates, making it an exceptional choice for building muscle and accelerating recovery between workouts. In contrast to whey protein concentrate, whey protein isolate undergoes further filtration to remove virtually all of the lactose, making it more suitable for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Whey protein isolate is known for its rapid absorption and ideal ratio of all nine essential amino acids (EAAs)—which includes the branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs)—necessary for stimulating muscle protein synthesis [1, 2]. In other words, whey protein isolate is about as good as it gets for kickstarting the muscle-building process after working out. By providing essential nutrients needed for muscle repair, whey protein isolate can reduce recovery time, allowing for more consistent and intense training sessions.

So, why does the "grass-fed" distinction matter for whey protein powder? The vast majority of whey protein powders are made from the milk of grain-fed cows, whereas grass-fed whey protein is derived from the milk of cows that graze on natural, pesticide-free grass pastures instead of feeding on grains. Grass-feeding positively impacts the nutritional composition and quality of a cow's milk (which is subsequently used to make cheese, and "whey" is a byproduct of cheesemaking) [3].

Research has found that grass-fed whey protein boasts higher levels of bioactive whey peptides (e.g. immunoglobulins and lactoferrin), omega-3 essential fatty acids, conjugated linoleic acid (CLA), and vitamins E and A—nutrients essential for inflammation control, muscle recovery, and overall health [4]. Just as important, grass-fed whey protein isolate is free from added hormones and antibiotics that may persist in conventional dairy products [5].

How to Use

Maximize your results with Transparent Labs Whey Protein Isolate by following these guidelines:

Mixing Instructions

Combine one scoop (~32 g) of Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate with 6-8 ounces of water, milk, or your preferred beverage in a shaker cup (with a wire whisk ball) for a smooth, delicious protein shake. Seal the shaker cup and shake vigorously for a few seconds until the powder is fully dissolved, then enjoy!

Optimal Consumption Times

Post-Workout Recovery: Whey protein isolate is quickly absorbed by the body, making it ideal for post-workout recovery as it helps to repair and build muscle tissue efficiently.

Anytime Protein Boost: Our grass-fed whey protein isolate can also be used in recipes (e.g., pancakes) and incorporated into foods like yogurt and oatmeal to easily increase daily protein intake.

FAQs

How Does Whey Protein Isolate Differ from Whey Protein Concentrate?

Whey Protein Isolate undergoes additional processing to remove most of the lactose and fat content, leaving >90% protein. Whey protein isolate is often preferred over whey protein concentrate due to its higher protein purity and reduced allergen content.

Is Whey Protein Good for Weight Loss or just Muscle Building?

Protein is known for its satiating and thermodynamic effects, which can help reduce hunger and increase calorie expenditure. Incorporating whey protein isolate into your diet can assist in weight management by promoting fullness and an energy deficit.

What’s in your “Natural Flavors”?

The natural flavors used in our products are derived from natural sources such as plants, fruits, or spices to enhance the taste of our products. For example, the organic compound isobutyl acetate is found in raspberries, pears, and pineapples and is used commercially to impart natural fruity flavors.

Food labeling practices require the term "natural flavor" to be used instead of the specific constituents that comprise the flavoring. We prioritize using natural flavors to provide a clean and enjoyable taste experience for our customers. If you're looking for a whey protein isolate with no natural flavors, try our Unflavored option!

Is it suitable for individuals with dietary restrictions or allergies?

Some flavors do contain nuts (please refer to the label for allergen warnings). We test for gluten and the main 8 FALCPA allergens in all of our products. We have an allergen segregation program and sanitize our lines after each allergen-containing production run.

We are also NSF-certified on the facility level - this means that our allergen control and segregation program is approved at the highest standard possible. Note that our peanut-based flavors contain actual peanuts, so those with peanut allergies should strictly avoid these flavors.

Whey isolate undergoes further processing to remove most of the lactose, making it a suitable option for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Who Should Not Take Whey Protein Powder?

Individuals with a milk allergy or severe lactose intolerance should not consume whey protein powders.

Is it Safe to Take Whey Protein Powder Every Day?

Yes, consuming whey protein powder daily is safe for most individuals. However, it's important not to rely on it as your sole source of protein.

Is the product tested by any third-party organizations for quality and safety?

TL Protein is certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein for quality assurance, composition, and banned substances. We also test all of our protein with 3rd-party labs for contaminants and ingredient composition. You can find all of our latest 3rd party testing data on this page.

Does Transparent Labs Ship to My Country?

Transparent Labs offers worldwide shipping, with a few exceptions due to import restrictions in the EU/UK, and high fraudulent activity in specific countries. Please check our shipping policy for more details.

When Will My Order Be Shipped Out?

All orders are dispatched the following business day.

name: Sleep & Recover - Melatonin Free
description_html:
Overview 

If you're having trouble sleeping but want a solution without melatonin, Transparent Labs Sleep & Recover now comes in a melatonin-free formula! The natural ingredients in this non-habit-forming sleep aid, such as L-glycine, VitaCherry®, magnesium, and L-theanine, have been clinically shown to help people fall asleep faster and support restful sleep quality so you wake up feeling refreshed and ready to take on the day—no more sleepless nights tossing and turning until the alarm goes off.

Key Features

Melatonin-Free Sleep Aid Made with Natural Ingredients: Transparent Labs Sleep & Recover promotes deep sleep and healthy sleep cycles with natural, evidence-based ingredients and no melatonin. This gentle formula is ideal for those who don't respond well to traditional/over-the-counter sleeping pills.

Eases Stress/Anxiety So You Can Fall Asleep Faster and Stay Asleep: If you have a hard time sleeping throughout the night, our melatonin-free sleep aid includes ingredients that can alleviate occasional sleeplessness by calming the nervous system before bedtime.

30 Servings Per Bottle = 30 Nights of Good Sleep: Our clinically dosed, melatonin-free sleep aid provides natural ingredients that help you get a good night's rest without any next-day drowsiness that often comes with melatonin-containing sleep aids.

Third-Party Tested for Purity and Potency: Our commitment to full product transparency and quality assurance means each batch of Transparent Labs Sleep & Recover undergoes third-party testing to ensure label claims are met.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

L-Glycine | 1,000 mg

L-glycine is a conditionally essential amino acid in humans that plays many roles in cellular physiology and has multifarious beneficial effects on cardiovascular, metabolic, and neurological health [1]. Numerous clinical trials have demonstrated the efficacy of glycine as a natural sleeping aid, even in modest doses (1,000 mg) before bedtime [2, 3]. Evidence suggests glycine acts on N-methyl-D-aspartate (NMDA) receptors in suprachiasmatic nuclei within the hypothalamus [4]. These tiny nuclei function as a bona fide “pacemaker” of the body’s innate circadian rhythms.

VitaCherry® Tart Cherry Powder | 500 mg

VitaCherry® is a patented tart cherry (Montmorency cherry) powder standardized to provide a rich profile of beneficial anthocyanins and antioxidant polyphenols, as well as B vitamins, calcium, magnesium, iron, and omega-3 essential fatty acids (EFAs). In fact, VitaCherry® is 15x more concentrated in the specific anthocyanins associated with reducing inflammation after vigorous exercise than generic tart cherry powders.

Multiple human studies have shown that tart cherry consumption significantly reduces post-exercise muscle soreness and enhances muscle recovery in high-level athletes [5].

L-Theanine | 200 mg

L-theanine is a non-proteinogenic amino acid first discovered as a constituent of green tea (Camellia sinensis) leaves. After ingestion, L-theanine is readily absorbed across the blood-brain barrier, where it exerts several nootropic effects, notably stimulating the release of alpha brainwaves and acting as a GABA receptor agonist [6, 7]. As such, L-theanine helps induce a sense of calmness and ease racing thoughts, which can help people fall asleep and improve sleep quality.

Rutaecarpine | 100 mg

Rutaecarpine is a major alkaloid isolated from Evodia rutaecarpa. Several studies have shown that it speeds the rate at which caffeine and caffeine derivatives are metabolized, thereby eliminating them from the body more rapidly [8, 9]. Thus, rutaecarpine helps calm the nervous system and “de-caffeinate” the body, which is imperative for restful sleep if you regularly drink coffee, pre-workouts, energy drinks, or other caffeinated beverages later in the day/evening.

Magnesium Bisglycinate | 200 mg

Magnesium is a macromineral electrolyte and cofactor (read: "helping hand") in over 350 enzymatic reactions in the human body. Its multifaceted roles make it essential for numerous body functions, including energy metabolism, protein synthesis, neuromuscular conduction, mood, cognition, cardiac contractility, and immunity [10].

Several clinical studies have demonstrated the effectiveness of magnesium glycinate supplements (including the bisglycinate form) for promoting restorative sleep and ameliorating sleep conditions such as insomnia [11].

The magnesium bisglycinate in this melatonin-free sleep aid does not cause a laxative effect in large doses and is gentle on the gastrointestinal tract, unlike other common forms of magnesium (e.g. magnesium oxide and magnesium citrate).

Zinc Citrate | 15 mg

Like magnesium, zinc is an essential mineral typically lacking in modern diets [19]. Our melatonin-free sleep aid contains bioavailable zinc citrate to ensure your body can absorb this key trace mineral.

Zinc deficiency is well-known to disrupt immune function, fertility, sex hormone production, mood, and sleep quality [20]. On the contrary, supplementing with a combination of zinc, magnesium, and vitamin B6 has been shown to confer synergistic sleep and recovery benefits, ideal for active individuals who struggle to get restful sleep [21].

Vitamin B6 (as Pyridoxal-5'-Phosphate) | 10 mg

Vitamin B6 is a water-soluble vitamin with extensive roles throughout the nervous system. In its bioactive pyridoxal-5-phosphate (PLP) form, it acts as a coenzyme in the conversion of tryptophan to 5-hydroxytryptamine (i.e. serotonin), which is a precursor of melatonin synthesis [22, 23]. This suggests that a deficiency of PLP may impair sleep quality and contribute to occasional sleeplessness.

Indeed, several studies have found that circulating PLP levels are inversely associated with sleep quality and sleeplessness [24, 25]. In other words, people with higher levels of PLP tend to sleep better and experience less daytime drowsiness.

How To Use

Take four (4) capsules 30-45 minutes before bedtime, preferably on an empty stomach.

Optimal Consumption Time

It is best to take this product at least 30 minutes before laying down for bed.

FAQs

How Much Melatonin Should I Take?

Taking melatonin is not a necessity to get a restful night's sleep. Our melatonin-free sleep aid contains natural ingredients that help you fall asleep faster and stay asleep, in part by promoting your body's endogenous production of melatonin.

Can You Fall Asleep Without Melatonin?

Yes! While melatonin is naturally produced by your body and induces sleepiness, an effective sleep aid doesn't require melatonin.

Is a Melatonin-Free Sleep Aid Safe?

The answer to this question depends on the nature of the ingredients in a melatonin-free sleep aid; our formula contains natural sleep-supporting ingredients that are well-established as safe in scientific literature.

Does Transparent Labs Ship to My Country?

Yes - our fulfillment center allows us to ship worldwide (with some exceptions due to fraudulent activity in certain countries; see here for more info). Standard shipping for international orders typically takes 10-14 business days to arrive.

name: Stim-Free Pre-Workout
description_html:
Overview 

Transparent Labs STIM-FREE Pre-Workout is for gym-goers and active individuals who exercise later in the afternoon/evening and those who are sensitive to stimulants like caffeine. Alternatively, you might be taking a "stim break" and looking to cut back on caffeine. In either case, this non-stimulant pre-workout formula has you covered with an evidence-based lineup of clinically dosed ingredients, coming in at a whopping 17 grams per serving!

Combine that with fully transparent labeling, great flavor, and absolutely no artificial color/food dyes, artificial sweeteners, or artificial flavoring, and it's no wonder STIM-FREE Pre-Workout has become a fan favorite.

Key Features

  • Stimulant-Free Pre-Workout Formula Backed by Science: Ideal for those sensitive to caffeine and nighttime gym-goers, Transparent Labs STIM-FREE Pre-Workout is formulated with clinically effective dosages of ergogenic ingredients to enhance your athletic performance without stimulants.

  • Enhances Strength, Stamina, and Muscle Pumps: With an unmatched blend of clinically dosed nitric oxide boosters, STIM-FREE Pre-Workout bolsters muscle strength, endurance, and blood flow starting from the very first scoop.

  • Promotes Clean, Lasting Focus, Drive, and Energy: Get dialed in for every workout with evidence-based nootropics like taurine, L-tyrosine, and huperzine-A. Since this is a stimulant-free formula, it won't give you jitters or cause a post-workout crash.

  • Naturally Flavored and Sweetened with Stevia: Most non-stim pre-workouts are loaded with artificial colors, sweeteners, and flavors. We know you care about what you put in your body, so STIM-FREE Pre-Workout contains only natural flavoring and stevia instead of the hidden junk you find in other pre-workout supplements.

  • Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

L-Citrulline Malate (2:1) |8,000 mg

L-citrulline is an amino acid naturally found in watermelon that plays an important role in kidney function. It's become a popular ingredient in pre-workout supplements due to its ability to boost nitric oxide levels [1]. When nitric oxide production increases, blood flow improves, allowing nutrients and oxygen to replenish muscle tissue more efficiently. Ultimately, this translates to greater muscle pumps and heightened energy levels.

Numerous studies have demonstrated the ergogenic effects of L-citrulline malate, the citrulline salt of malic acid, such as:

  • Improving strength, aerobic performance, and muscle endurance [2, 3]

  • Elevating nitric oxide levels even more than equivalent doses of L-arginine [4]

  • Enhancing muscle anabolism and reducing muscle catabolism [5]

Beta-Alanine | 4,000 mg

Beta-alanine is a beta-amino acid that combines with L-histidine to form a dipeptide known as carnosine. Supplementing with beta-alanine has been shown to increase muscle carnosine levels, which are quickly depleted during intense exercise [6].

Carnosine is an endogenous dipeptide that functions as a buffer in muscle cells, thereby attenuating the accumulation of acidic byproducts of muscular exertion (e.g. lactate and hydrogen ions) [7]. Hence, bolstering muscle carnosine levels—via beta-alanine—allows you to push yourself longer and harder in the gym.

Pre-workout supplements almost always contain beta-alanine but in inefficacious doses. We made sure to include an evidence-based dose of beta-alanine (2,000 mg) in every scoop of LEAN Pre-Workout. Relevant evidence-based benefits of beta-alanine include:

  • Delaying the onset of neuromuscular fatigue during intense exercise [8]

  • Increasing overall muscle strength [9] 

  • Improving muscle endurance and total work capacity [10]

  • Reducing and combatting the formation of dysfunctional proteins and promoting the formation of healthy proteins [11]

  • Significantly increasing lean muscle mass as part of a diligent resistance-training program [12]

*Note that beta-alanine causes a benign tingling sensation known as paresthesia while the body acclimates to higher carnosine levels. This effect is harmless and gradually lessens with consistent use.

BetaPure™ Betaine Anhydrous | 2,500 mg

Betaine, also known as trimethylglycine, is a biologically important osmolyte and methyl donor. Betaine supplementation has been shown to improve strength gains and, to a lesser extent, endurance capacity in athletes [13, 14, 15]. Though the mechanisms are not entirely clear, Pre-workout betaine use ostensibly promotes athletic performance by maintaining cellular hydration and reducing homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health [16].

Taurine | 1,300 mg

L-taurine is a non-proteinogenic amino acid often considered essential to pre-workout supplementation due to its diverse benefits for athletes and gym-goers. For one, taurine is a potent nootropic that promotes focus and attenuates brain cell inflammation and oxidative stress [17, 18].

Taurine can also enhance physical performance via increased blood flow to skeletal muscle tissue [19, 20]. Greater blood flow to muscle tissue encourages a favorable milieu for muscle function and recovery during training. L-Tyrosine | 1,000 mg

L-tyrosine is a conditionally essential amino acid and precursor to dopamine and norepinephrine, two neurotransmitters that govern motivation and reward. Research shows that supplementing with L-tyrosine can significantly enhance cognitive performance and increase alertness, especially under acute stress (such as intense training) [22]. L-tyrosine has also been shown to improve “cognitive flexibility,” meaning it can help you adapt to dynamic cognitive demands without letting extraneous thoughts undermine your focus [23].

Senactiv® 50mg

SenActiv® is a patented adaptogenic herb combination featuring Panax notoginseng and rose hips (Rosa roxburghii). Likewise, the rose hips in this ingredient provide several ginsenoside-like molecules that confer synergistic recovery-enhancing effects with ginsenoside R1 [24]. These phytonutrients are suggested to work by bolstering a cellular "cleaning" process known as autophagy, particularly in skeletal muscle cells [25, 26, 27].

elevATP® Ancient Peat and Apple Fruit Extract | 150 mg

ElevATP® is a clinically researched combination of  “ancient peat” (fossilized plants) and apple skin extracts. Using innovative biotechnology, elevATP® stimulates your body’s endogenous production of adenosine triphosphate (ATP), the veritable energetic currency of cells.

BioPerine® | 5 mg

BioPerine® is a patented black pepper (Piper nigrum) fruit extract standardized for its piperine content. Piperine is a natural alkaloid known for its “bioenhancer” properties, improving the bioavailability of molecules that are typically poorly absorbed or extensively metabolized in the liver [31, 32]. Hence, BioPerine® helps your body better absorb and utilize the other active ingredients in Bulk Black Pre-Workout.

Huperzine A is a naturally occurring alkaloid found in the Chinese club moss Huperzia serrata. It has gained prominence in the world of cognitive enhancement for its ability to inhibit acetylcholinesterase, an enzyme that breaks down acetylcholine in the brain. Acetylcholine is a key neurotransmitter involved in muscle contraction, arousal, sleep, and cognition.

For Beginners to Pre-Workout Supplements

To assess tolerance, mix 1/2 scoop of Transparent Labs STIM-FREE Pre-Workout with 6 to 8 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach. If the effects feel subtle, increase to a full scoop before the next workout.

For Experienced Pre-Workout Supplement Users

Mix 1 full scoop of Transparent Labs Stim Free Pre-Workout with 10 to 12 oz of water and consume 20-30 minutes before exercising, preferably on an empty stomach.

Curcumin C3® Complex is a clinically studied herbal extract obtained from the dried rhizomes of Cucruma longa (turmeric) and standardized to contain 95% bioactive curcumin, bisdemethoxycurcumin, and demethoxycurcumin — collectively referred to as curcuminoids. Clinical evidence suggests that curcuminoids have ubiquitous roles in the body, affecting vital biological processes such as immune function, detoxification, metabolism, stress response, neuroplasticity, joint integrity, digestion, and much more [1].

When it comes to curcumin supplements and turmeric extract, curcuminoids are generally not well-absorbed orally, resulting in minimal uptake into the bloodstream [2]. This is precisely where our Curcumin C3® Complex capsules shine, as they provide superior absorption and upwards of 200x greater bioavailability than generic curcumin/turmeric extract formulas. We also added BioPerine® black pepper fruit extract to bolster intestinal uptake and reduce liver metabolism of bioactive curcuminoids.

name: Vitality Testosterone Support
description_html:
Product Overview

Transparent Labs Vitality is an innovative 3-in-1 natural hormone optimizing supplement that boosts bioactive testosterone levels while controlling estrogen and cortisol production.

Set the foundation for lean muscle gains, fat burning, strength, libido, confidence, and overall vitality with clinical doses of proven ingredients, such as LJ100® Eurycoma longifolia extract, KSM-66® organic ashwagandha extract, PrimaVie® shilajit extract, L-OptiZinc®, and BioPerine®. These premium ingredients work synergistically to protect Leydig cells that comprise the testicles, reduce aromatase activity, and augment luteinizing hormone (LH) and follicle-stimulating hormone (FSH) which govern testosterone production and fertility.

In turn, TL Vitality primes the body for optimal well-being and athletic performance by encouraging balanced ratios of testosterone to cortisol and testosterone to estradiol.

Ingredient Profile

Directions: As a Dietary Supplement, Take 2 Capsules Once Daily.

Serving Size: 2 Capsules

Servings Per Container: 30

Zinc (as L-OptiZinc® (L-Methionine)) - 15 mg

L-OptiZinc® is a special chelated zinc that’s formed with L-methionine. Research shows that zinc-methionine complex is one of the most bioavailable forms of zinc, ensuring your body properly absorbs and utilizes this key mineral.1Zinc has diverse actions in the human body since it is a cofactor for various metalloenzymes.

Human studies suggest that zinc is especially crucial for supporting fertility and testosterone production in adult males.2,3 One study found that middle-aged men with preexisting infertility experienced an average 250% increase in sperm cell counts and 54% increase in total testosterone levels after taking a zinc supplement daily for three months.4 Also, males with zinc deficiency are generally at a greater risk of infertility.5

Organic Ashwagandha Extract (as KSM-66®) - 600 mg

KSM-66® Ashwagandha Root Extract (standardized to contain ≥5% withanolides): Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) is arguably the most versatile adaptogenic herb known to man. A thorough body of clinical research has shown that ashwagandha consumption promotes healthy testosterone levels and mitigates stress-induced cortisol secretion, thereby encouraging better quality of life in men.6 Notably, a formative 3-month study of 75 adult males given 600 mg of ashwagandha root extract daily found that testosterone levels increased an average of 40% above baseline values.7 Their sperm cell count (i.e. fertility) also improved significantly.

Shilajit Extract (as PrimaVie®) - 250mg

Shilajit is a rare exudate (thick fluid) found naturally in rocks of the Himalayan mountains; it’s formed over the course of centuries by microorganisms that decompose plant material. Shilajit is commonly used in Ayurveda as a means of improving vitality and overall well-being. Several controlled human studies have shown that shilajit can significantly increase total testosterone and free testosterone levels, the latter of which is the “biologically useful” form of testosterone.8 One recent clinical trial even found that healthy adult males given a purified shilajit supplement for 90 days experienced nearly 50% greater increases in free testosterone levels than those who were in the placebo group9.

Quercetin Dihydrate - 250 mg

Quercetin is a secondary plant metabolite (polyphenol) found in a range of fruits and vegetables. It’s a vital micronutrient that serves antioxidant roles in many important body systems, particularly the cardiovascular system and reproductive system.10 Several murine studies suggest that quercetin protects Leydig cells — the cells that comprise testicular tissue — from toxin-induced damage, thereby preserving testosterone levels and fertility11,12.

DIM (Diindolylmethane) - 125 mg

3,3′-diindolylmethane (DIM) is a bioactive metabolite of indole-3-carbinol (I3C), a phytochemical found in cruciferous vegetables like cabbage, broccoli, and cauliflower. DIM appears to regulate estrogen metabolism by selectively modulating the aryl-hydrocarbon receptor, which plays an important role in gene expression in both men and women.13 In vivo and in vitro data suggest that DIM has favorable effects on muscle growth, recovery, libido, mood, and overall well-being by balancing estradiol levels14,15

LJ100® (Standardized Eurycoma longifolia extract) - 100mg

Eurycoma longifolia, commonly referred to as Tongkat ali or Longjack, has been used for centuries in folk medicine as a natural aphrodisiac and appetite-stimulating herb. The roots of this plant contain a range of compounds called quassinoids, the most noteworthy being eurycomanone. Several studies have shown that athletes supplementing Eurycoma longifolia have significant increases in the ratio of testosterone to cortisol, as well as improvements in lean body mass, strength, and arm circumference.16,17,18 Vitality is formulated with premium LJ100® that delivers a standardized amount of bioactive quassinoids.

Bioperine® (Black Pepper (Fruit) Extract) - 10 mg

Bioperine® is an extract obtained from the black pepper fruit. In its patented form, BioPerine® has been clinically tested (in the United States) to significantly enhance the bioavailability of various supplement nutrients through increased absorption.

Boron (as Bororganic Glycine) - 5 mg

Boron is an essential trace mineral that plays numerous roles throughout the body. A recent research review suggests that men who supplement with boron daily have significantly higher levels of testosterone and lower levels of estradiol (estrogen) than those who don’t take a boron supplement.19 Even more compelling, supplemental boron has been shown to boost free testosterone and reduce estrogen within just one week.20

Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has become a pantry staple among health-conscious consumers who want a quality source of protein for supporting muscle growth, recovery, and overall health. Unlike many protein powders on the market, TL whey protein isolate is sourced from grass-fed cattle, raised humanely and without the use of growth hormones or hormonal agents, and contains absolutely no artificial sweeteners, food dyes, or fillers.

Choose from 14 (and counting) delicious flavor options, or select the unflavored option if you prefer a pure whey protein isolate powder with a neutral taste. Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate is easy to mix with liquids and can be incorporated into various recipes, making it a convenient and versatile protein source that fits easily into any diet.

Key Features:

28 grams of protein per serving, boasting an industry-leading protein-by-weight percentage of 87.5% (may vary slightly by flavor).

Sourced exclusively from grass-fed American dairy cattle, raised without the use of growth hormone, growth factors, and/or anabolic steroids.

Made with natural ingredients and no artificial sweeteners, fillers, food dyes, gluten, or preservatives.

Third-Party Tested and Certified for Quality: As part of our commitment to industry-leading transparency and quality, every batch of this product is tested by a third-party lab for purity and potency. You can find all of our test results in the footer of our website. This product is also certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein to meet the highest standards for athletes and consumers.

Virtually lactose-free and only 1 gram of fat per serving, perfect for adding an easily digestible, quality source of protein to your diet.

Trusted by the best to be the best, with an overall rating of 98 out of 100 by Labdoor and backed by athletes like Paul Sklar & Hafthor Björnsson, Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate has set a standard as the cleanest whey protein powder available.

Available in 14 delicious flavors that cater to every palate while supporting lean muscle growth and overall protein intake.

Active Ingredients and Benefits

Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate

The quality of your protein matters, and whey protein isolate is one of the purest forms of protein available. It provides a high protein content with minimal fats and carbohydrates, making it an exceptional choice for building muscle and accelerating recovery between workouts. In contrast to whey protein concentrate, whey protein isolate undergoes further filtration to remove virtually all of the lactose, making it more suitable for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Whey protein isolate is known for its rapid absorption and ideal ratio of all nine essential amino acids (EAAs)—which includes the branched-chain amino acids (BCAAs)—necessary for stimulating muscle protein synthesis [1, 2]. In other words, whey protein isolate is about as good as it gets for kickstarting the muscle-building process after working out. By providing essential nutrients needed for muscle repair, whey protein isolate can reduce recovery time, allowing for more consistent and intense training sessions.

So, why does the "grass-fed" distinction matter for whey protein powder? The vast majority of whey protein powders are made from the milk of grain-fed cows, whereas grass-fed whey protein is derived from the milk of cows that graze on natural, pesticide-free grass pastures instead of feeding on grains. Grass-feeding positively impacts the nutritional composition and quality of a cow's milk (which is subsequently used to make cheese, and "whey" is a byproduct of cheesemaking) [3].

Research has found that grass-fed whey protein boasts higher levels of bioactive whey peptides (e.g. immunoglobulins and lactoferrin), omega-3 essential fatty acids, conjugated linoleic acid (CLA), and vitamins E and A—nutrients essential for inflammation control, muscle recovery, and overall health [4]. Just as important, grass-fed whey protein isolate is free from added hormones and antibiotics that may persist in conventional dairy products [5].

How to Use

Maximize your results with Transparent Labs Whey Protein Isolate by following these guidelines:

Mixing Instructions

Optimal Consumption Times

Post-Workout Recovery: Whey protein isolate is quickly absorbed by the body, making it ideal for post-workout recovery as it helps to repair and build muscle tissue efficiently.

FAQs

How Does Whey Protein Isolate Differ from Whey Protein Concentrate?

Whey Protein Isolate undergoes additional processing to remove most of the lactose and fat content, leaving >90% protein. Whey protein isolate is often preferred over whey protein concentrate due to its higher protein purity and reduced allergen content.

Is Whey Protein Good for Weight Loss or just Muscle Building?

Protein is known for its satiating and thermodynamic effects, which can help reduce hunger and increase calorie expenditure. Incorporating whey protein isolate into your diet can assist in weight management by promoting fullness and an energy deficit.

What’s in your “Natural Flavors”?

The natural flavors used in our products are derived from natural sources such as plants, fruits, or spices to enhance the taste of our products. For example, the organic compound isobutyl acetate is found in raspberries, pears, and pineapples and is used commercially to impart natural fruity flavors.

Food labeling practices require the term "natural flavor" to be used instead of the specific constituents that comprise the flavoring. We prioritize using natural flavors to provide a clean and enjoyable taste experience for our customers. If you're looking for a whey protein isolate with no natural flavors, try our Unflavored option!

Is it suitable for individuals with dietary restrictions or allergies?

Some flavors do contain nuts (please refer to the label for allergen warnings). We test for gluten and the main 8 FALCPA allergens in all of our products. We have an allergen segregation program and sanitize our lines after each allergen-containing production run.

We are also NSF-certified on the facility level - this means that our allergen control and segregation program is approved at the highest standard possible. Note that our peanut-based flavors contain actual peanuts, so those with peanut allergies should strictly avoid these flavors.

Whey isolate undergoes further processing to remove most of the lactose, making it a suitable option for those who have difficulty digesting lactose.

Individuals with a milk allergy or severe lactose intolerance should not consume whey protein powders.

Is it Safe to Take Whey Protein Powder Every Day?

Yes, consuming whey protein powder daily is safe for most individuals. However, it's important not to rely on it as your sole source of protein.

TL Protein is certified by Informed Choice and Informed Protein for quality assurance, composition, and banned substances. We also test all of our protein with 3rd-party labs for contaminants and ingredient composition. You can find all of our latest 3rd party testing data on this page.
